translation.en: 55.Do that, my God, for one whose fear of You is greater than his craving from You,

segments.arabic: وَبِمَنْ يَأْسُهُ مِنَ النَّجَاةِ أَوْكَدُ مِنْ رَجَائِهِ لِلْخَلاَصِ،

translation.en: 56.whose hopelessness of deliverance is firmer than his hope for salvation!
57.Not that his hopelessness is despair,
58.nor that his expectation is deluded.
59.No, rather his good deeds are few among his evil deeds
60.and his arguments are frail in face of everything due from his acts.

segments.arabic: فَأَمَّا أَنْتَ يَا إلهِي فَأَهْلٌ أَنْ

translation.en: 61.But Thou, my God, art worthy that
62.the righteous not be deluded concerning You
63.and the sinners not lose hope in You,

segments.arabic: لِاَنَّكَ ألرَّبُّ الْعَظِيمُ الَّذِيْ لاَ يَمْنَعُ أَحَداً فَضْلَهُ

translation.en: 64.for You art the All-mighty Lord who holds back His bounty from none
65.and takes His full right from no one.
66.High exalted is Your mention above those mentioned!
67.Holy are Your names beyond those described!
68.Spread is Your favour among all creatures!

segments.arabic: فَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ عَلَى ذَلِكَ يَا رَبَّ الْعَالَمِينَ .

translation.en: 69.Thine is the praise for that, O Lord of the worlds!

text.en: The tried and tested Istighfar of Imam Ali (a.s)

translation.en: In the Name of Allah the most beneficent & the most merciful

segments.arabic: (1) اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ مِنْ كُلِّ ذَنْبٍ قَوِيَ عَلَيْهِ بَدَنِيْ بِعَافِيَتِكَ، اَوْ نَالَتْهُ قُدْرَتِيْ بِفَضْلِ نِعْمَتِكَ، اَوْ بَسَطْتُ اِلَيْهِ يَدِيْ بِسَابِغِ رِزْقِكَ، اَوِ اتَّكَلَتْ فِيْهِ عِنْدَ خَوْفِيْ مِنْهُ عَلٰي آنَاتِكَ، اَوِ احْتَجَبْتُ فِيْهِ مِنَ النَّاسِ بِسِتْرِكَ، اَوْ وَثِقْتُ مِنْ سَطْوَتِكَ عَلَيَّ فِيْهِ بِحِلْمِكَ، اَو عَوَّلْتُ فِيْهِ عَلٰى كَرَمِ عَفْوِكَ۔

translation.en: 1) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those sins which I have committed while being in comfort and peace and from those sins which I have committed due to excess of bounties which you showered upon me and from those sins which I have committed due to increase in sustenance and from those sins which I should have been afraid of but I did not refrain from it since I was aware of your forbearance and from those sins which you did not expose to the people and from those sins which I have committed since I was sure that it would not be spread by you and from those sins concerning which I relied on your forgiveness۔

segments.arabic: (2) اَللّٰهُمَّ انِّيْ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ مِنْ كُلِّ ذَنْبٍ خُنْتُ فِيْهِ اَمَانَتِيْ، اَوْ بَخَّسْتُ بِفِعْلِهٖ نَفْسِيْ، اَوِ احْتَطَبْتُ بِهٖ عَلٰي بَدَنِيْ، اَوْ قَدَّمْتُ فِيْهِ لَذَّتِيْ، اَوْ آثَرْتُ فِيْهِ شَهْوَتِيْ، اَوْ سَعَيْتُ فِيْهِ لِغَيْرِيْ، اَوِ اسْتَغْوَيْتُ اِلَيْهِ مَنْ تَبِعَنِيْ، اَوْ كَايَدْتُ فِيْهِ مَنْ مَنَعَنِيْ، اَوْ قَهَرْتُ عَلَيْهِ مَنْ عَادَانِيْ، اَوْ غَلَبْتُ عَلَيْهِ بِفَضْلِ حِيْلَتِيْ، اَوْ اَحَلْتُ عَلَيْكَ مَوْلَايَ، فَلَمْ تَغْلِبْنِيْ عَلٰى فِعْلِيْ، اِذْ كُنْتَ كَارِهًا لِمَعْصِيَتِيْ فَحَلُمْتَ عَنِّىْ، لٰكِنْ سَبَقَ عِلْمُكَ فِيَّ بِفِعْلِىْ ذٰلِكَ، لَمْ تُدْخِلْنِيْ يَا رَبِّ فِيْهِ جَبْرًا، وَلَمْ تَحْمِلْنِيْ عَلَيْهِ قَهْرًا، وَلَمْ تَظْلِمْنِيْ فِيْهٍ شَيْئًا، فَاَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لَهٗ وَلِجَمِيْعِ ذُنُوْبِيْ۔

translation.en: 2) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those sins where in I have deceived my soul and from those sins in which I regarded myself low and from those sins due to which I was eligible for your punishment and from those sins in which my desires conquered my heart and from those sins in which I preferred the carnal desires of my heart۔ Woe be unto me Oh my Lord! I consider you weak but you did not prevent me (with force) from my (bad) deeds and inspite of being unhappy with my actions, you forbeared it where as you were already aware of my nature۔ Oh my Lord! You did not force me in my actions and in this way did not do injustice to me۔ I seek your forgiveness from this sins and from all types of sins۔

segments.arabic: (3) اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ مِنْ كُلِّ ذَنْبٍ تُبْتُ اِلَيْكَ مِنْهُ، وَاَقْدَمْتُ عَلٰي فِعْلِهٖ فَاسْتَحْيَيْتُ مِنْكَ وَاَنَا عَلَيْهِ، وَ رَهِبْتُكَ وَاَنَا فِيْهِ تَعَاطَيْتُهٗ وَعُدْتُ اِلَيْهِ۔

translation.en: 3) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those sins whose forgiveness I have asked from you and from those sins upon which I hastened myself۔ Thus I am ashamed of you regarding those sins which I have committed while being afraid of your chastisement but continued and pursued it again۔

segments.arabic: (4) اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِكُلِّ ذَنْبٍ كَتَبْتَهٗ عَلَيَّ بِسَبَبِ خَيْرٍ اَرَدْتُ بِهٖ وَجْهَكَ فَخَالَطَنِيْ فِيْهِ سِوَاكَ، وَشَارَكَ فِعْلِيْ مَالَا يَخْلُصُ لَكَ، اَوْ وَجَبَ عَلَيَّ مَا اَرَدْتَ بِهٖ سِوَاكَ، وَكَثِيْرُ مِنْ فِعْلِيْ مَا يَكُوْنُ كَذٰلِكَ۔

translation.en: 4) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those sins which you have written for me due to those good deeds which I determined to perform for your sake only but could not remain sincere in my intention and performed those deeds in which my intention was not purely for you but it was for others also and from those actions which made it necessary for me to change my intention other than you and most of my actions were similar to it۔

segments.arabic: (5) اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ مِنْ كُلِّ ذَنْبٍ تَوَرَّكَ عَلَيَّ بِسَبَبِ عَهْدٍ عَاهَدْتُكَ عَلَيْهِ، اَوْ عَقْدٍ عَقَدْتُهٗ لَكَ، اَوْ ذِمَّةٍ وَاثَقْتُ بِهَا مِنْ اَجْلِكَ لِاَحَدٍ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ، ثُمَّ نَقَضْتُ ذٰلِكَ مِنْ غَيْرِ ضَرُوْرَةٍ لَزِمْتَنِيْ فِيْهِ، بَلِ اسْتَزَلَّنِيْ اِلَيْهِ عَنِ الْوَفَاءِ بِهِ الْاَشَرُ، وَمَنَعَنِيْ عَنْ رِعَايَتِهِ الْبَصَرُ۔

translation.en: 5) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those sins regarding which pledge had been taken from me by you that I would not commit them and from those promises which I had done to you and the covenant which I had with you (but could not fulfill it) and the responsibility of one of your servants which I made incumbent upon me for your sake (but could not discharge those duties) ۔Thereafter I violated (broke) my pledge without any excuse and my pride and egotism also kept me away from fulfilling it (my promise)۔

segments.arabic: (6) اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِكُلِّ ذَنْبٍ رَهِبْتُ فِيْهِ مِنْ عِبَادِكَ، وَخِفْتُ فِيْهِ غَيْرَكَ وَاسْتَحْيَيْتُ فِيْهِ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ ثُمَّ اَفْضَيْتَ بِهٖ فِعْلِيْ اِلَيْكَ۔

translation.en: 6) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those sins at the time of committing which I was afraid of your servants and other than you and was ashamed of your creatures but later continued it again( without fearing you)۔

segments.arabic: (7) اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِكُلِّ ذَنْبٍ اَقْدَمْتُ عَلَيْهِ وَاَنَا مُسْتَيْقِنٌ اَنَّكَ تُعَاقِبُ عَلَي ارْتِكَابِهٖ فَارْتَكَبْتُهٗ۔

translation.en: 7) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those sins which I have committed after having certainty that you would rebuke me for it۔

segments.arabic: (8) اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِكُلِّ ذَنْبٍ قَدَّمْتُ فِيْهِ شَهْوَتِي عَلٰي طَاعَتِكَ وَ آثَرْتُ مَحَبَّتِيْ عَلٰي اَمْرِكَ، وَ اَرْضَيْتُ فِيْهِ نَفْسِيْ بٍسَخَطِكَ، وَقَدْ نَهَيْتَنِيْ عَنْهُ بِنَهْيِكَ، وَتَقَدَّمْتَ اِلَيَّ فِيْهِ بِاِعْذَارِكَ، وَاحْتَجَجْتَ عَلَيَّ فِيْهِ بِوَعِيْدِكَ۔

translation.en: 8) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those sins in which desires of my heart overcame your obedience and I preferred my likeliness to your orders۔ I preferred the satisfaction of my soul to your order and satiated my self with your anger where as you had already asked me to keep away from it and before I could commit those sins, you left no room for my justification (excuse) by warning me in advance of its impending (possible) chastisement۔

segments.arabic: (9) اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ مِنْ كُلِّ ذَنْبٍ عَلِمْتُهٗ مِنْ نَفْسِيْ، اَوْ ذَهَلْتُهٗ اَوْ نَسَيْتُهٗ، اَوْ تَعَمَّدْتُهٗ اَوْ اَخْطَاتُهٗ، مِمَّا لَا اَشُكُّ اَنَّكَ سَائِلِيْ عَنْهُ، وَاَنَّ نَفْسِيْ مُرْتَهَنَةٌ بِهٖ لَدَيْكَ، وَاِنْ كُنْتُ قَدْ نَسِيْتُهٗ اَوْ غَفَلَتْ نَفْسِيْ عَنْهُ۔

translation.en: 9) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those sins which I was aware of and from those sins which I was unaware of and from those sins which I committed by mistake and from those sins which I committed intentionally or unintentionally in spite of knowing that you would ask me regarding those sins and that I would be questioned by you۔

segments.arabic: (10) اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِكُلِّ ذَنْبٍ وَاجَهْتُكَ بِهٖ، وَقَدْ اَيْقَنْتُ اَنَّكَ تَرَانِيْ وَاَغْفَلْتُ اَنْ اَتُوْبَ اِلَيْكَ مِنْهُ، اَوْ نَسِيْتُ اَتُوْبَ اِلَيْكَ مِنْهُ، اَوْ نَسِيْتُ اَنْ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لَهٗ۔

translation.en: 10) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those sins with regards to which I would be accounted for in front of you and regarding which I had certainty that you were watching me but I became negligent that I would be returning to you and concerning which I forgot to seek your repentance and your forgiveness۔

segments.arabic: (11) اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِكُلِّ ذَنْبٍ دَخَلْتُ فِيْهِ، وَاَحْسَنْتُ ظَنِّيْ بِكَ اَنْ لَّا تُعَذِّبْنِيْ عَلَيْهِ، وَاَنَّكَ تَكْفِيْنِيْ مِنْهُ۔

translation.en: 11) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those sins regarding which I hoped positively about you that you would not punish me for it and that you would save me from its punishment۔

segments.arabic: (12) اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِكُلِّ ذَنْبِ نِاسْتَوْجَبْتُ بِهٖ مِنْكَ رَدَّ الدُّعَاءِ، وَحِرْمَانَ الْاِجَابَةِ، وَخَيْبَةَ الطَّمَعِ، وَالنْفِسَاخَ الرَّجَاءِ۔

translation.en: 12) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those sins due to which I was deprived of the blessing of praying and my requests were not granted and my prayers were not answered and due to which I became disappointed of my wishes (that my wishes would not be granted by you)۔

segments.arabic: (13) اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِكُلِّ ذَنْبٍ يُعَقِّبُ الْحَسْرَةَ، وَيُوْرِثُ النَّدَامَةَ وَيَحْبِسُ الرِّزْقَ، وَيَرُدُّ الدُّعَاءِ۔

translation.en: 13) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those sins which became the cause of my regret and sorrow and which shortened my sustenance and because of which my prayers were not answered۔

segments.arabic: (14) اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِكُلِّ ذَنْبٍ يُوْرِثُ الْاَسْقَامَ، وَيُعَقِّبُ الضَّنَاءَ وَيُوْجِبُ النِّقَمَ، وَيَكُوْنُ آخِرُهٗ حَسْرَةً وَّنَدَامَةً۔

translation.en: 14) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those sins which gave rise to my illness and disability and is the cause of my punishment and hardships (adversity) and which finally resulted in my regret and repentance۔

segments.arabic: (15 اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ مِنْ كُلِّ ذَنْبٍ مَدَحْتُهٗ بِلِسَانِيْ، اَوْ هَشَّتْ اِلَيْهِ نَفْسِيْ، اَوِ اكْتَسَبْتُهٗ بِيَدِيْ وَهُوَ عِنْدَكَ قَبِيْحٌ تُعَاقِبُ عَلٰي مِثْلِهٖ وَتَمْقُتْ مَنْ عَمِلَهٗ۔

translation.en: 15) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those sins which I praised with my tongue and from those sins towards which my soul was attracted and from those sins which I committed though it was disliked by you and early,you had punished for those sins which were similar to it۔

segments.arabic: (16 اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِكُلِّ ذَنْبٍ خَلَوْتُ بِهٖ فِي لَيْلٍ اَوْ نَهَارٍ، حَيْثُ لَا يَرَانِيْ اَحَدٌ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ، فَمِلْتُ فِيْهِ مِنْ تَرْكِهٖ بِخَوْفِكَ، اِلَى ارْتِكَابِهٖ بِحُسْنِ الظَّنِّ بِكَ، فَسَوَّلَتْ لِيْ نَفْسِيَ الْاِقْدَامَ عَلَيْهِ فَوَاقَعْتُهٗ، وَاَنَا عَارِفٌ بِمَعْصِيَتِيْ لَكَ فِيْهِ۔

translation.en: 16) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those sins which I have committed in day and night in loneliness in such a way that no one could see me from your creatures۔ Thereafter I left it out of your fear but later I inclined towards it since I was optimistic regarding you that you would not punish me (for it)۔ In this way my soul was deceived and I disobeyed you though I was fully aware of it ۔

segments.arabic: (17 اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِكُلِّ ذَنْبِ نِاسْتَقْلَلْتُهٗ، اَوِ اسْتَصْغَرْتُهٗ، اَوِ اسْتَعْظَمْتُهٗ وَتَوَرَّطْتُ فِيْهِ۔

translation.en: 17) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those sins which I took lightly and considered it small and from those sins in which I was involved though I was knowing how severe it was!۔

segments.arabic: (18) اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِكُلِّ ذَنْبٍ مَالَئْتُ فِيْهِ عَلٰي اَحَدٍ مِنْ بَرِيَّتِكَ، اَوْ زَيِّنَتُهٗ لِنَفْسِيْ اَوْ مَاتُ بِهٖ اِلٰي غَيْرِيْ، وَدَلَلْتُ عَلَيْهِ سِوَايَ، اَوْ اَصْرَرْتُ عَلَيْهِ بِعَمَدِيْ، اَوْ اَقَمْتُ عَلَيْهِ بِحِيْلَتِيْ۔

translation.en: 18) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those sins in which I helped one of your servants and from those sins which I beautify in front of my self and from those sins which I introduced to others or made others aware of it and from those sins which I continued after being fully aware of it۔

segments.arabic: (19) اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِكُلِّ ذَنْبِ نِاسْتَعَنْتُ عَلَيْهِ بِحِيْلَتِيْ بِشَيْءٍ مِمَّا يُرَادُ بِهٖ وَجْهَكَ، اَوْ يُسْتَظْهَرُ بِمِثْلِهٖ عَلٰي طَاعَتِكَ، اَوْ يُتَقَرَّبُ بِمِثْلِهٖ اِلَيْكَ، وَوَارَيْتُ عَنِ النَّاسِ وَلَبَّسْتُ فِيْهِ، كَاَنِّيْ اَرِيْدُكَ بِحِيْلَتِيْ وَالْمُرَادُ بِهٖ مَعْصِيَتُكَ، وَالْهَوٰي فِيْهِ مُتَصَرِّفٌ عَلٰي غَيْرِ طَاعَتِكَ۔

translation.en: 19) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those sins which I committed after creating some excuses for it and from those actions through which I disobeyed you and from those actions through which I sought your nearness but was not sincere in my actions۔ Apparently it appeared that my actions were only for your sake but in fact I was disobedient to you and my desires (wishes) in it were not according to your obedience۔

segments.arabic: (20) اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِكُلِّ ذَنْبٍ كَتَبْتَهٗ عَلَيَّ بِسَبَبِ عُجْبٍ، كَانَ بِنَفْسِيْ اَوْ رِيَاءٍ اَوْ سُمْعَةٍ، اَوْ خُيَلَاءَ اَوْ فَرَحٍ، اَوْ اَشَرٍ، اَوْ بَطَرٍ، اَوْ حِقْدٍ، اَوْ حَمِيَّةٍ، اَوْ غَضَبٍ، اَوْ رِضًي، اَوْ شُحٍّ، اَوْ بُخْلٍ، اَوْ ظُلْمٍ، اَوْ خِيَانَةٍ، اَوْ سِرْقَةٍ، اَوْ نَوْعٍ مِنْ اَنْوَاعِ مَا يُكْتَسَبُ بِمِثْلِهِ الذُّنُوْبُ وَيَكُوْنُ بِاجْتِرَاحِهِ الْعَطْبُ۔

translation.en: 20) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those sins which you have written for me due to my egotism, ostentation, show off, ostentation in worship, pride, useless mirth (joy, happiness), envy, being rebellious in front of truth, thanklessness, jealousy, greediness, anger, miserliness, oppression, treachery, theft, lie, useless work, sports and play (games), and similarly other sins and the result of which was the cause of my destruction and annihilations۔

segments.arabic: (21) اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِكُلِّ ذَنْبٍ سَبَقَ فِي عِلْمِكَ اَنِّيْ فَاعِلُهٗ فَدَخَلْتُ فِيْهِ بِشَهْوَتِي، وَاجْتَرَحْتُهٗ بِاِرِادَتِي وَقَارَفْتُهٗ بِمَحَبَّتِيْ وَلَذَّتِيْ وَمَشِيَّتِيْ، وَشِئْتُهٗ اِذْ شِئْتَ اَنْ اَشَائَهٗ، وَاَرَدْتُهٗ اِذْ اَرَدْتَ اَنْ اُرِيْدَهٗ، فَعَمِلْتُهٗ اِذْ كَانَ فِيْ قَدِيْمِ تَقْدِيْرِكَ وَنَافِظِ عِلْمِكَ اَنِّيْ فَاعِلُهٗ، لَمْ تُدْخِلْنِيْ فِيْهِ جَبْرًا، وَلَمْ تَحْمِلْنِيْ عَلَيْهِ قَهْرًا، وَلَمْ تَظْلِمْنِيْ فِيْهِ شَيْئًا، فَاسْتَغْفِرُكَ لَهٗ وَلِكُلِّ ذَنْبٍ جَرٰي بِهٖ عِلْمُكَ عَلَيَّ وَفِيَّ اِلٰي آخِرِ عُمْرِيْ۔

translation.en: 21) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those sins which was already there in your knowledge that I would commit it۔ Then I committed it out of my own desires and acted upon and proceeded in it intentionally and was involved in it with my own wish, lust and desires۔ I committed those sins with my own wish but you did not prevent me from it (by force) and in this way you have not done any type of injustice to me۔ Hence I seek your forgiveness till the end of my life from these sins and from all those sins which your knowledge encompasses۔

segments.arabic: (22) اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِكُلِّ ذَنْبٍ مَالَ بِسَخَطِيْ فِيْهِ عَنْ رِضَاكَ، وَمَالَتْ نَفْسِيْ اِلٰي رِضَاكَ فَسَخِطْتُهٗ، اَوْ رَهِبْتُ فِيْهِ سِوَاكَ، اَوْ عَادَيْتُ فِيْهِ اَوْلِيَائَكَ اَوْ وَالَيْتُ فِيْهِ اَعْدَائَكَ، اَوِ اخْتَرْتُهُمْ عَلٰي اَصْفِيَائِكَ، اَوْ خَذَلْتُ فِيْهِ اَحِبَّائَكَ، اَوْ قَصَّرْتُ فِيْهِ عَنْ رِضَاكَ يَا خَيْرَ الْغَافِرِيْنَ۔

translation.en: 22) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those sins in which I preferred my anger to your happiness where as my soul was inclined to your satisfaction (wishes) but I turned against your wishes and from those sins with respect to which I was afraid of other than you۔ I bear enmity with your friends and befriended your enemies and gave them preference over your best servants and from those sins in committing which I ignored your satisfaction, Oh the most merciful!

segments.arabic: (23) اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِكُلِّ ذَنْبٍ تُبْتُ اِلَيْكَ مِنْهُ ثُمَّ عُدْتُ فِيْهِ۔

translation.en: 23) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those sins whose forgiveness I had asked from you but later I continued it again۔

segments.arabic: (24) وَاَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِمَا اَعْطَيْتُكَ مِنْ نَفْسِيْ ثُمَّ لَمْ اَفِ بِهٖ۔

translation.en: 24) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those promises which I had done to you but could not fulfill it afterwards۔

segments.arabic: (25) وَاَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِلنَّعْمَةِ الَّتِيْ اَنْعَمْتَ بِهَا عَلَيَّ فَقَوَيْتُ بِهَا عَلٰي مَعْصِيَتِكَ۔

translation.en: 25) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those bounties that you had bestowed on me but I used it in your disobedience۔

segments.arabic: (26) وَاَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِكُلِّ خَيْرٍ اَرَدْتُ بِهٖ وَجْهَكَ فَخَالَطَنِيْ مَا لَيْسَ لَكَ۔

translation.en: 26) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those good works regarding which I had decided that I would do it for your satisfaction but later, I was not sincere in my intention۔

segments.arabic: (27) وَاَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِمَا دَعَانِيْ اِلَيْهِ الرُّخَصَ فِيْمَا اشْتَبَهٗ عَلَيَّ مِمَّا هُوَ عِنْدَكَ حَرَامٌ۔

translation.en: 27) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those actions which were not prohibited apparently but was forbidden according to you۔

segments.arabic: (28) وَاَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِلذُّنُوْبِ الَّتِيْ لَا يَعْلَمُهَا غَيْرُكَ، وَلَا يَطَّلِعُ عَلَيْهَا سِوَاكَ، وَلَا يَحْتَمِلُهَا اِلَّا حِلْمُكَ، وَلَا يَسَعُهَا اِلَّا عَفْوُكَ۔

translation.en: 28) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from all those sins which are not known to anybody except you and nobody is aware of it except you, and no one can bear it except your forbearance and there is no rescue from it other than your forgiveness۔

segments.arabic: (29) وَاَسْتَغْفِرُكَ وَاَتُوْبُ اِلَيْكَ مِنْ مَظَالِمِ كَثِيْرَةٍ لِعِبَادِكَ قِبَلِيْ، يَا رَبِّ فَلَمْ اَسْتَطِعْ رَدَّهَا عَلَيْهِمْ وَتَحْلِيْلَهَا مِنْهُمْ، اَوْ شَهِدُوْا فَاسْتَحْيَيْتُ مِنِ اسْتِحْلَالِهِمْ وَالطَّلَبِ اِلَيْهِمْ وَاِعْلاَمِهِمْ ذٰلِكَ، وَاَنْتَ الْقَادِرُ عَلٰي اَنْ تَسْتَوْهِبَنِيْ مِنْهُمْ وَتُرْضِيَهُمْ عَنِّيْ كَيْفَ شِئْتَ وَبِمَا شِئْتَ يَا اَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِيْنَ، وَاَحْكَمَ الْحَاكِمِيْنَ وَخَيْرَ الْغَافِرِيْنَ۔

translation.en: 29) Oh my Lord! I truly seek your forgiveness from some of the needs of your servant which were incumbent upon me (but I could not fulfill it) and I did not have courage to seek his pardon for it and if he is present in front of me, I feel ashamed to ask him that he forgive me where as you have the power to make him please (happy) with me, Oh the most merciful and the most forgiving!

segments.arabic: (30) اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اِسْتَغْفَارِيْ اِيَّاكَ مَعَ الْاِصْرَارِ لُؤْمٌ، وَتَرْكِيَ الْاِسْتِغْفَارَ مَعَ مَعْرِفَتِيْ بِسِعَةِ جُوْدِكَ وَرَحْمَتِكَ عَجْزٌ، فَكَمْ تَتَحَبَّبُ اِلَيَّ يَا رَبِّ وَاَنْتَ الْغَنِيُّ عَنِّيْ، وَكَمْ اَتَبَغَّضُ اِلَيْكَ وَاَنَا الْفَقِيْرُ اِلَيْكَ وَاِلٰي رَحْمَتَكَ، فَيَا مَنْ وَعَدَ فَوَفَا، وَاَوْعَدَ فَعَفَا، اِغْفِرْلِيْ خَطَاياَيَ، وَاعْفُ وَارْحَمْ وَاَنْتَ خَيْرُ الرَّاحِمِيْنَ

translation.en: 30) Oh my Lord! It is true that my seeking forgiveness from you with persistence is my baseness (ignobility) and the abandonment of seeking your forgiveness inspite of having recognition of your bountless mercy is my inability (helplessness)۔ Oh my Lord! How many times you have showed your affection to me though you are needless of me and how many times I rebelled against you where as I was in need of your mercy۔ Oh the one who has promised me (of forgiveness), fulfill your promise۔ Woe be to one who turned rebellious to you but you forgave him۔ Please forgive my lapses۔ Forgive me and have mercy on me Oh the most merciful!
In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
O Allah, it is my hope for Your expansive mercy
that has motivated me to ask for accepting my true repentance,
and it is my hope for Your forbearance and leniency
that has encouraged me to beg Your security and pardon.
O my Lord, I have committed sins,
which are worthy of encountering Your punishment,
and [I have committed] wrongdoings, which have been observed by the eyes of eradication

segments.arabic: وَٱسْتَوْجَبْتُ بِهَا عَلَىٰ عَدْلِكَ الِيمَ ٱلْعَذَابِ

translation.en: and due to which, I deserve Your painful chastisement despite of Your justice,
and because I have committed these wrongdoings, I earn Your annihilating punishment.
I am thus afraid that these wrongdoings will obstruct You from responding to me
and will make You refuse to grant me my requests,
since they are violative enough to abolish my petition
and to cut off the factors of achieving my desires,

segments.arabic: مِنْ اجْلِ مَا قَدْ انْقَضَ ظَهْرِي مِنْ ثِقْلِهَا
segments.transliteration: min ajli maqad anqada zahri min thiqliha

translation.en: because their overburdens have pressed heavily upon my back
and their loads have been too heavy for me to burden.

segments.arabic: ثُمَّ تَرَاجَعْتُ رَبِّ إِلىٰ حِلْمِكَ عَنِ ٱلْخَاطِئِينَ

translation.en: But when I recalled Your forbearance, O my Lord, with the wrongdoers,
Your forgiveness to the sinful,
and Your mercy to the disobedient,
I, carrying my trust in You and relying on You, came towards You,
throwing myself in Your Presence,
complaining about my grief to You,

segments.arabic: سَائِلاًَ رَبِّ مَا لاَ اسْتَوْجِبُهُ مِنْ تَفْرِيجِ ٱلْهَمِّ
segments.transliteration: sa'ilan rabbi malaastawjibuhu min tafriji alhammi

translation.en: praying You, O my Lord, for what I do not deserve from You; that is relief from my distress,
and for what I do not earn from You; that is alleviation of my anguish,
declaring my true repentance before You, O my Lord,
and putting my trust in You, O my Master.
O Allah, s0 (please) bestow upon me with relief from You,
confer upon me with creating for me an easy way out,
lead me, out of Your clemency, to the straightest path,
make me, out of Your omnipotence, deviate from the crooked path,

segments.transliteration: wa khallisni min sijni alkarbi bi'iqalatika

translation.en: release me, out of Your acceptance of my true repentance, from the prison of ordeals,
set me free from my capture, out of Your mercy,
donate me with favors, out of Your pleasure,
give me generously, out of Your benevolence,
steady me, O my Lord, from my slip,
relieve me from my agony,
have mercy upon my sobbing,
do not make my prayer inaccessible,
and by accepting my repentance, (please) strengthen my back,
confirm my strength,
set aright all my affairs,
grant me long lifetime,

segments.transliteration: warhamni yawma hashri wa waqta nashri

translation.en: and have mercy upon me on the day of my resurrecting and the time of my restoring to life.
Verily, You are all-magnanimous, all-generous,
all-forgiving, and all-merciful.
And (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and his Household.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي قَصَدْتُ إِلَيْكَ بِإِخْلاَصِ تَوْبَةٍ نَصُوحٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni qasadtu ilayka bi'ikhlasi tawbatin nasuhin

translation.en: O Allah, I have come to You with the integrity of a sincere repentance,
the confirmation of a valid determination,
the prayer of a limpid heart,
and the declaration of a clear-cut statement.
So, O Allah, accept from me the sincere repentance of me,
the approaching of my swift turning to You,
and the deadly blows of my fear of Your punishment.

segments.transliteration: wa qabil rabbi tawbati bijazili alththawabi

translation.en: O my Lord, meet my repentance with abundant reward,
generous final return,
absolvement of castigation,
warding off penalty,
winning of returning to You,
and covering with screen [against sinning].

segments.arabic: وَٱمْحُ ٱللَّهُمَّ مَا ثَبَتَ مِنْ ذُنُوبِي

translation.en: O Allah, erase my fixed sins,
wash out all my defects by accepting my repentance,
and make my repentance to polish my heart,
to diagnose the insight of my mind,
to rinse my filth,
to purify my bodily impurity,
to set aright my inner self,
and to urge my insight to act upon it [i.e. my repentance] immediately.
O my Lord, admit my repentance,
because it emanates from my sincere intention
and from the most accurate and purest form of my perception.
It [i.e. my repentance] also involves perfect determination of my inner self,
an attempt to keep my soul pure,
my firmness to turn to You in repentance,
and my decision to run for obeying Your orders.

segments.arabic: وَٱجْلُ ٱللَّهُمَّ بِٱلتَّوْبَةِ عَنِّي ظُلْمَةَ ٱلإِصْرَارِ

translation.en: O Allah, by means of my repentance, (please) drive away the darkness of insistence on sinning from me,

segments.arabic: وَٱمْحُ بِهَا مَا قَدَّمْتُهُ مِنَ ٱلاوْزَارِ

translation.en: erase my burdensome sins that I have committed,
and dress me the clothing of piety
and the garments of true guidance,

segments.arabic: فَقَدْ خَلَعْتُ رِبْقَ ٱلْمَعَاصِي عَنْ جَلَدِي

translation.en: for I am determined to remove the rein of acts of disobedience to You from my neck
and to strip the shirt of sinning of my body,
holding fast to Your omnipotence, O my Lord,
seeking Your help against myself by Your almightiness,
entrusting with You my repentance from breaching my covenant with You by Your protection of me,
taking refuge in Your haven against that You may disappoint me,

segments.arabic: مُقَارِناً بِهِ لاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِكَ
segments.transliteration: muqarinan bihi lahawla wa laquwwata illabika

translation.en: believing that there is neither might nor power except with You.

text.en:
Offer a two unit prayer in each unit of which you may recite Surah
<ref=1:112>al-Ekhlas</ref>
 sixty times (of course, after Surah <ref=1:1>Al-Fatehah</ref>
. When
you finish, your sins will be forgiven.

Within the devotional rites on Friday, Shaykh al-Tusi, in Misbah al-
Mutahajjid, has quoted the following:
‘Abdullah ibn Mas’ud is reported to have quoted the Holy Prophet
(s.a.w.a.) as saying: Whoever offers a two unit prayer on Fridays after
the ‘Asr (afternoon) prayer, in the first unit of which he recites Surah
<ref=1:1>Al-Fatehah</ref>
 and <ref=1:2:255>Ayah al-Kursi</ref>
 and repeats Surah <ref=1:113>Al-Falaq</ref>
 twenty-five
times, and in the second unit, he recites Surah al-Faatehah and Surah
<ref=1:112>al-Ekhlas</ref>
 and repeats Surah <ref=1:114>Al-Nas</ref>
 twenty-five times and repeats
after accomplishment the following statement twenty-five times, will
not depart this world before Almighty Allah shows him Paradise in
dreams and shows him his place therein:

segments.arabic: لاحَوْلَ وَلاقوَةَ إِلاّ بِالله العَليّ العَظيمِ

translation.en: There is no power nor strength save with Allah, the Most High, the Almighty.

text.en:
Sayyid Ibn Tawus, in Jamal al-Usbu’, Chapter: 33, has mentioned a
form of prayer for forgiveness. About this prayer, he added, “This is a
great and noble prayer that is known well by the bearers of the divine
secrets. Hence, beware of belittling this prayer.”
However, refer to the book involved in order to acquaint yourself
with this prayer

This prayer consists of two units in each of which Surah <ref=1:1>Al-Fatehah</ref>
 and Surah <ref=1:97>Al-Qadr</ref> 
 are recited once each. After the recitation
of these Surahs, the following supplicatory prayer is repeated fifteen
times:

translation.en: Lord, Your forgiveness, Your forgiveness

text.en:
The same supplicatory prayer is repeated, yet ten times, in the
genuflection of the prayer. Then, the prayer is accomplished just like
the famous prayer of Ja’far

It is worth mentioning that the prayer for forgiveness is offered as
same as this prayer for pardon, except that its supplicatory prayer
should be as follows: رب عفوک استغفر اللهThis prayer is also useful for beseeching for expansive sustenance,
Allah willing

First: Imam al-Sadiq (`a) is reported to have said: say the following words 3 times just before leaving. If he does, he will be kept under the custody of  Allah swt until He returns him to the place he has left:

translation.en: Allah is the Most Great.

text.en: Then, repeat the following statement three times:

translation.en: I leave (putting my trust) in Allah,
I return (putting my trust) in Allah,
and on Allah do I depend.

text.en: Then, say the following statement, yet one time only:

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ ٱفْتَحْ لِي فِي وَجْهِي هٰذَا بِخَيْرٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma iftah li fi wajhi hadha bikhayrin

translation.en: O Allah, (please) grant me easiness in the beginning of this affair of mine
seal it for me with easiness,

segments.arabic: وَقِنِي شَرَّ كُلِّ دَابَّةٍ انْتَ آخِذٌ بِنَاصِيَتِهَا
segments.transliteration: wa qini sharra kulli dabbatin anta akhidun binasiyatiha

translation.en: and guard me against the evil of every living creature that You hold by its forelock.
Surely, my Lord is on the right path.

text.en: Second: Imam al-Sajjad (`a) is reported to have said: At the door of your house just before you leave it, you may say the following words:

translation.en: In the Name of Allah (I begin) and in Allah (I trust).
I put my trust in Allah.

text.en: Third: Imam al-Baqir (`a) is reported to have said: Whoever says the following statement when he leaves his house, Almighty Allah will save him from whatever of his this-worldly and otherworldly affairs that concern him:

translation.en: In the Name of Allah (I begin).
Sufficient to me is Allah.
I put my trust in Allah.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْالُكَ خَيْرَ امُورِي كُلِّهَا
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka khayra umuri kulliha

translation.en: O Allah, I beseech You for success in all of my affairs

segments.arabic: وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ خِزْيِ ٱلدُّنْيَا وَعَذَابِ ٱلآخِرَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa a`udhu bika min khizyi alddunya wa `adhabi al-akhirati

translation.en: and I pray Your protection against disgrace in this world and chastisement in the Hereafter.

text.en: Fourth: Imam al-Sadiq (`a) is reported to have said: Whenever you leave your house, you are advised to say the following prayer:

translation.en: In the Name of Allah (I begin).
In Allah I put my trust.

segments.arabic: لاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: la hawla wa la quwwata illa billahi

translation.en: There is neither might nor power except with Allah.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي اسْالُكَ خَيْرَ مَا خَرَجْتُ لَهُ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka khayra ma kharajtu lahu

translation.en: O Allah, I beseech You for success in what I am leaving to do

segments.arabic: وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَرَجْتُ لَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa a`udhu bika min sharri ma kharajtu lahu

translation.en: and pray Your protection against failure in what I am leaving to do.
O Allah, (please) expand Your favors to me,
make perfect Your graces to me,
dedicate me to obedience to You,
make me desire for what You have in possession,

segments.transliteration: wa tawaffani `ala millatika wa millati rasulika

translation.en: and cause me to die carrying the principles You have instructed and the principles of Your Messenger,
may Allah bless him and his Household.

text.en: Fifth: Imam al-Rida (`a) is reported to have said: My father (`a) used to say the following words whenever he would leave his house: Image

translation.en: In the Name of Allah; the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
I am leaving by the might and power of Allah,
but not by my own might or power;

segments.arabic: بَلْ بِحَوْ لِكَ وَقُوَّتِكَ يَا رَبِّ
segments.transliteration: bal bihawlika wa quwwatika ya rabbi

translation.en: rather, by the might and power of You, O Lord,
seeking Your sustenance.
So, (please) provide me with it easily.

text.en: Sixth: Imam al-Sadiq (`a) is reported to have said, “Whoever repeats Surah al-Tawhid ten times before he leaves his house, will be kept under the safeguard and protection of Almighty Allah until he returns home.”

Seventh:Imam Abul Hassan Musa (`a) is reported to have said: When you intend to travel, you may stop at the door of your house and recite  Surah al-Fatiah (No. 1) in front of you as well as to your right and left sides. You may also recite Surah-Tawhid, Surah     al-Falaq (No. 113), and Sura al-Naas(No. 114). You may then say the following prayer

translation.en: O Allah, (please) safeguard me and safeguard whatever is with me,

segments.transliteration: wa sallimni wa sallim ma ma`iya

translation.en: keep me safe and keep safe whatever is with me,

segments.arabic: وَبَلِّغْنِي وَبَلِّغْ مَا مَعِيَ بَلاَغاً حَسَناً
segments.transliteration: wa ballighni wa balligh ma ma`iya balaghan hasanan

translation.en: and make me and whatever is with me reach my destination in a perfect way.

text.en: Eighth: Imam Musa al-Kazim (`a) is also reported to have said: Whenever you leave your house, whether going on a journey or going to a certain place in your city, you may say the following words:

translation.en: In the Name of Allah (I begin),
in Allah do I believe,
and in Allah do I put my trust.
Only what Allah wills (shall come to pass).

segments.arabic: لاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: la hawla wa la quwwata illa billahi

translation.en: There is neither might nor power except with Allah.
O Allah, I intend to travel;
so, choose for me the best in my journey,

segments.arabic: وَاوْضِحْ لِي فِيهِ سَبِيلَ ٱلرَّايِ وَفَهِّمْنِيهِ
segments.transliteration: wa awdih li fihi sabila alrra'yi wa fahhimnihi

translation.en: make clear before me and inspire to me the right understanding of the most accurate attitude,
release my determination by means of straightforwardness,
include me with safety during my journey,
furnish me with abundant fortune and honor,
and preserve me with the excellent safeguard and watching.
O Allah, send away from me the inconvenience of journeys,
make easy for me the difficulty of roughness,
unwrap before me the rug of covering the stations,

segments.transliteration: wa qarrib minni bu`da na'yi almanahili

translation.en: bring nearer to me the remote watering places,

segments.arabic: وَبَاعِدْ فِي ٱلْمَسِيرِ بَيْنَ خُطَىٰ ٱلرَّوَاحِلِ
segments.transliteration: wa ba`id fi almasiri bayna khutaalrrawahili

translation.en: and make spaces to be longer between the steps of our riding animals,
so that the remote distances will be nearby
and the rough roads will be smooth.

segments.arabic: وَلَقِّنِي ٱللَّهُمَّ فِي سَفَرِي نُجْحَ طَائِرِ ٱلْوَاقِيَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa laqqini allahumma fi safari nujha ta'iri alwaqiyati

translation.en: O Allah, make me find in this journey success over evil omens,
endue me with achievement of wellbeing,
safeguard against failure,
guidance to survive dangers,
incentives to gain adequacy,
and good opportunity to be protected against authorities.
O Allah, cause my journey to be a reason for winning marvelous security
and obtaining profits.

segments.arabic: وَٱجْعَلِ ٱللَّيْلَ عَلَيَّ سِتْراً مِنَ ٱلآفَاتِ

translation.en: Make night cover me against banes
and daytime defend me against perishing things.
Out of Your omnipotence, (please) hold back the robbers from reaching me
and, out of Your power, guard me against the beasts
so that safety will accompany me in my journey,
wellbeing will attend me,
good omen will be driven along with me,
easiness will embrace me,
difficulty will depart me,
triumph will agree with me,
and security will associate with me.
Verily, You are the Lord of bestowals, conferrals,
power, and might,
and You have power over all things
and You know and regard all of Your servants.

name: Whenever a horrifying matter inflicts you

text.en: Imam al-Baqir (`a) is reported to have said: Whenever a horrifying matter inflicts you, you may turn your face towards the kiblah direction and offer a two-unit prayer. Upon accomplishment, you may say this supplicatory prayer seventy times, and submit your requests each time you come to its end:

translation.en: O best seer of all those who can see,
O best hearer of all those who can hear,
O swiftest of those who settle account,
and O most merciful of all those who show mercy!

name: Whoever is inflicted by a distress

text.en: The Holy Prophet (s) has said: Whoever is inflicted by a distress, a grief, angst, or a hardship, may say the following statement::

segments.arabic: اللَّهُ رَبِّي لاَ أُشْرِكُ بِهِ شَيْئاً
segments.transliteration: allahu rabbi la ushriku bihi shay'an

translation.en: Allah is my Lord; I never associate any thing to Him.

segments.arabic: تَوَكَّلْتُ عَلَىٰ ٱلْحَيِّ ٱلَّذِي لاَ يَمُوتُ

translation.en: I put my trust in the Ever-living Who never dies.

text.en: Imam al-Sadiq (`a) is reported to have said:

When his brothers threw (Prophet) Joseph in the well, Archangel Gabriel came to him and said, “O boy, what are doing here?” Joseph answered, “My brothers have thrown me in this well.” “Do you like to come out of it?” asked the archangel. “This is up to Allah the Almighty and All-majestic.” answered Joseph, “If He wishes, He will do.” “Allah the All-exalted says to you that if you pray me with this supplicatory prayer, I will take you out of this well,” taught Gabriel. “What is this supplicatory prayer?” asked Joseph.“It is this one,” taught Archangel Gabriel:

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِأَنَّ لَكَ ٱلْحَمْدَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka bi-anna laka lhamda

translation.en: O Allah, I beseech You in the name of (the fact) that to You is all praise;
there is no god save You, the All-donor,
the excellent originator of the heavens and the earth,
and the Lord of majesty and honor

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: to bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.arabic: وَأَنْ تَجْعَلَ لِي مِمَّا أَنَا فِيهِ فَرَجاً وَمَخْرَجاً
segments.transliteration: wa an taj`ala li mimma ana fihi farajan wa makhrajan

translation.en: and to prepare for me a relief and way out from what I am in. After that, the caravan came and took Prophet Joseph out of the well, as the Holy Qur'an has related.

text.en: Imam al-Sadiq (`a) is reported to have said: Whenever you fear something, you may say the following supplicatory prayer

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنَّكَ لاَ يَكْفِي مِنْكَ أَحَدٌ
segments.transliteration: allahumma innaka la yakfi minka ahadun

translation.en: O Allah, nothing can ever save from You

segments.arabic: وَأَنْتَ تَكْفِي مِنْ كُلِّ أَحَدٍ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa anta takfi min kulli ahadin min khalqika

translation.en: while You alone can save from any of Your creatures;
so, save me from…

text.en: (You may now mention the thing that terrifies you.)
According to another tradition, you may say the following supplicatory prayer (whenever you fear something):

translation.en: O He Who saves from all things
while nothing can ever save from You
neither in the heavens nor on the earth,

segments.arabic: ٱكْفِنِي مَا أَهَمَّنِي مِنْ أَمْرِ ٱلدُّنْيَا وَٱلآخِرَةِ
segments.transliteration: ikfini ma ahammani min amri alddunya wal-akhirati

translation.en: (please) save me from what has distressed me, be it a this-worldly or a otherworldly affair,
and send blessings upon Muhammad and his Household.

text.en: Imam al-Sadiq (`a) has also said: Whoever comes to a ruler whom he fears, may say the following supplicatory prayer (before presence before the ruler):

translation.en: With Allah do I commence,
from Allah do I seek success,

segments.arabic: وَبِمُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ أَتَوَجَّهُ
segments.transliteration: wa bimuhammadin salla allahu `alayhi wa alihi atawajjahu

translation.en: and in the name of Muhammad, may Allah bless him and his Household, do I turn my face (towards Allah).
O Allah, (please) make easy for me the difficulty of this matter
and facilitate for me its complication,

segments.transliteration: fa'innaka tamhu ma tasha'u wa tuthbitu

translation.en: for You verily efface what You will and establish (what You will)
and with You is the source of ordinance.
Sufficient to me is Allah.
There is no god but Him.
In Him do I trust
and He is the Lord of the Great Throne.

segments.transliteration: wa amtani`u bihawli allahi wa quwwatihi

translation.en: I take shelter in Allah’s might and power
against their might and power.
I take shelter in the Lord of the dawn
against the evil of what He has created.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa billahi

translation.en: There is neither might nor power except with Allah.

text.en: This supplicatory prayer is reported to have said by Imam al-Baqir (`a) whenever a distressing matter would take place::

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (please) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
forgive me, have mercy upon me,
multiply my (good) deed, make easy my place of return,
guide my heart, secure my fear,
grant me wellbeing throughout my whole lifetime,
admit my plea, forgive my wrongdoings,

segments.transliteration: wa bayyid wajhi wa`simni fi dini

translation.en: whiten my face, preserve me with regard to my faith,

segments.arabic: وَسَهِّلْ مَطْلَبِي وَوَسِّعْ عَلَيَّ فِي رِزْقِي
segments.transliteration: wa sahhil matlabi wa wassi` `alayya fi rizqi

translation.en: make easy for me to attain my aim, and expand Your sustenance to me,
for I am too weak to do that.
(Please) overlook the evil I have done
in the name of the good You always do,
do not make me suffer from the loss of myself,
and do not make me suffer from the loss of one I intimately love.

segments.arabic: وَهَبْ لِي يَا إِلٰهِي لَحْظَةً مِنْ لَحَظَاتِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa hab li ya ilahi lahzatan min lahazatika

translation.en: (Please) grant me, O my God, one of Your glances

segments.arabic: تَكْشِفُ بِهَا عَنِّي جَمِيعَ مَا بِهِ ابْتَلَيْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: takshifu biha `anni jami`a ma bihi ibtalaytani

translation.en: through which You may relieve me from all what You have tested me through

segments.arabic: وَتَرُدُّ بِهَا عَلَيَّ مَا هُوَ أَحْسَنُ عَادَتِكَ عِنْدِي
segments.transliteration: wa taruddu biha `alayya ma huwa ahsanu `adatika `indi

translation.en: and through which You may endue me again with the best of Your usual bestowals to me,

segments.transliteration: faqad da`ufat quwwati wa qallat hilati

translation.en: for my power has decreased, my plans have failed,
and my hope in Your creatures have lost

segments.arabic: وَلَمْ يَبْقَ إِلاَّ رَجَاؤُكَ وَتَوَكُّلِي عَلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: wa lam yabqa illa raja'uka wa tawakkuli `alayka

translation.en: and nothing remained except my hope in You and my trust in You.

segments.arabic: وَقُدْرَتُكَ عَلَيَّ يَا رَبِّ أَنْ تَرْحَمَنِي وَتُعَافِيَنِي
segments.transliteration: wa qudratuka `alayya ya rabbi an tarhamani wa tu`afiyani

translation.en: Your power, O my Lord, to have mercy upon me and to grant me wellbeing
is the same as Your power to chastise and afflict me.
O my God, my remembrance of Your conferrals entertains me
and my expectation of Your favors strengthens me.

segments.arabic: وَلَمْ أَخْلُ مِنْ نِعَمِكَ مُنْذُ خَلَقْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: wa lam akhlu min ni`amika mundhu khalaqtani

translation.en: I have never done without Your favors since You created me.
So, You are my lord, my master,
my shelter, my haven,
my protector, my defender,
the merciful to me, the guarantor of my sustenance,

segments.arabic: وَفِي قَضَائِكَ وَقُدْرَتِكَ كُلُّ مَا أَنَا فِيهِ
segments.transliteration: wa fi qada'ika wa qudratika kullu ma ana fihi

translation.en: and whatever I am in is under Your decree and authority.
So, O my master and cherisher,

segments.transliteration: fima qadayta wa qaddarta wa hatamta

translation.en: within Your decrees, decisions, and inevitable commands,

segments.arabic: تَعْجِيلُ خَلاَصِي مِمَّا أَنَا فِيهِ جَمِيعِهِ
segments.transliteration: ta`jilu khalasi mimma ana fihi jami`ihi

translation.en: (please) decide on my salvation from all that which I am suffering
and on granting me wellbeing,

segments.arabic: فَإِنِّي لاَ أَجِدُ لِدَفْعِ ذٰلِكَ أَحَداً غَيْرَكَ
segments.transliteration: fa'inni la ajidu lidaf`i dhalika ahadan ghayraka

translation.en: for I cannot find any one who can do all that except You
and I trust in none save You.
O Lord of majesty and honor,

segments.arabic: عِنْدَ أَحْسَنِ ظَنِّي بِكَ وَرَجَائِي لَكَ
segments.transliteration: `inda ahsani zanni bika wa raja'i laka

translation.en: (please) act according to the good idea I have about You and according to the hope I have in You,

segments.transliteration: warham tadarru`i wastikanati wa da`fa rukni

translation.en: have mercy on my earnest humbleness, my submission, and the weakness of my support,

segments.arabic: وَٱمْنُنْ بِذٰلِكَ عَلَيَّ وَعَلَىٰ كُلِّ دَاعٍ دَعَاكَ
segments.transliteration: wamnun bidhalika `alayya wa `ala kulli da`in da`aka

translation.en: and endue me, as well as all suppliants that supplicate You, with all of that.
O most merciful of all those who show mercy!

segments.transliteration: wa salla allahu `ala muhammadin wa alihi

translation.en: May Allah bless Muhammad and his Household.

text.en: Imam al-Sadiq (`a) is reported to have said: `Ali ibn al-Husayn (`a) used to say: After I say these words, I do not care even if all men and jinn support each other against me::

translation.en: In the Name of Allah (I begin), in Allah (I trust),

segments.transliteration: wa min allahi wa ila allahi

translation.en: from Allah (I derive power), to Allah (I resort),
in the way of Allah (I proceed),
and on the principles of Allah’s Messenger (I advance),
may Allah bless him and his Household.
O Allah, to You have I submitted myself,
towards You have I turned my face,
to You have I commended my cause,
and with You have I entrusted my affairs.
O Allah, (please) safeguard me with the safeguard of faith

segments.transliteration: min bayni yadayya wa min khalfi

translation.en: before me, behind me,
to my right side, to my left side,

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ فَوْقِي وَمِنْ تَحْتِي وَمَا قِبَلِي
segments.transliteration: wa min fawqi wa min tahti wa ma qibali

translation.en: above me, beneath me, and in front of me,
and defend me with Your might and power,

segments.arabic: فَإِنَّهُ لاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِكَ
segments.transliteration: fa'innahu la hawla wa la quwwata illa bika

translation.en: since there is neither might nor power except with You.

text.en: The following supplicatory prayer of the Ahl al-Bayt (i.e. the Holy Prophet’s Household) may be said to fend off agonies, horrifying matters, and sways of ruling authorities:

translation.en: O He Who existed before all things!
O He Who composed all things!

segments.transliteration: wa ya baqiyan ba`da kulli shay'in

translation.en: O He Who shall survive after all things!
(Please) bless Muhammad and Muhammad’s Household and…

text.en: You may now submit your requests.
Imam Muhammad al-Taqi (`a) is reported to have said: In order to reach at relief (from a trouble), it is recommended to say this supplicatory prayer regularly::

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ يَكْفِي مِنْ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ
segments.transliteration: ya man yakfi min kulli shay'in

translation.en: O He Who saves from all things
but nothing can ever save from Him,
(please) save me from what has distressed me.

name: Who was afflicted with a calamity

text.en: Imam Zayn al-`abidin (`a) is reported to have said to his sons: Whenever one of you is inflicted by a misfortune or troubled by a crisis, he should perform the ritual ablution (wudu') as perfectly as possible, offer a two-unit or four-unit prayer, and say the following supplicatory prayer thereafter:

translation.en: O target of all complaints!
O hearer of all confidential talks!
O witness of all gatherings!
O knower of all hidden things!

segments.arabic: وَيَا دَافِعَ مَا يَشَاءُ مِنْ بَلِيَّةٍ
segments.transliteration: wa ya dafi`a ma yasha'u min baliyyatin

translation.en: O repelling of whatever tribulation You will to repel!
O friend of Abraham!
O talker to Moses!
O chooser of Muhammad,
may Allah bless him and his Household!
I supplicate You with the supplication of one whose indigence is extreme,
whose stratagem has failed,
and whose ability has fallen short;
the supplication of one who is stranger, drowned, distressed;

segments.arabic: ٱلَّذِي لاَ يَجِدُ لِكَشْفِ مَا هُوَ فِيهِ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ
segments.transliteration: alladhi la yajidu likashfi ma huwa fihi illa anta

translation.en: one who has no one at all to relieve him from what he is suffering save You,
O most merciful of all those who show mercy!

text.en: No one uses this supplicatory prayer but that Almighty Allah, if He wills, shall relieve him from what he is suffering.
Imam al-Sadiq (`a) is reported to have said: To remove any distress and grief, you may bathe yourself, offer a two-unit prayer, and say the following supplicatory prayer:.

translation.en: O Reliever of distress
and Remover of agony!

segments.transliteration: ya rahmana alddunya wal-akhirati wa rahimahuma

translation.en: O Beneficent and Merciful of this world and the Hereafter,
(please) relieve my distress
and remove my agony.
O Allah Who is the One,
the One and Only, and the eternally besought of all;

segments.transliteration: alladhi lam yalid wa lam yulad

translation.en: Who begets not nor was begotten

segments.transliteration: wa lam yakun lahu kufwan ahadun

translation.en: and there is none comparable unto Him,
(please) protect me, purify me,
and eliminate my tribulation.

text.en: You may then recite ayah al-Kursi, Surah al-Falaq, and Surah al-Nas.
To pray for removing agony, it is reported that one may repeat the following supplicatory prayer one hundred times in a position of prostration:

translation.en: O He Who is ever-living! O He Who is self-subsisting!
O He save Whom there is no god!
In the name of Your mercy do I seek aid;
so, (please) save me from what has distressed me
and do not refer me to myself.

text.en: Imam Musa ibn Ja`far (`a) is reported to have said to Suma`ah: If you have an urgent need to be granted by Almighty Allah, you should say this supplicatory prayer::

translation.en: O Allah, I beseech You
in the name of Muhammad and `Ali,

segments.arabic: فَإِنَّ لَهُمَا عِنْدَكَ شَأْناً مِنَ ٱلشَّأْنِ

translation.en: for they both enjoy a remarkable standing with You
and a significant status;
so, (I beseech You) in the name of this standing
and in the name of this status

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَأَنْ…
segments.transliteration: an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin wa an…

translation.en: (please) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad, and…

text.en: You may now submit your request.
Indeed, on the Resurrection Day, all archangels, missioned prophets, and tested faithful believers will be in need for Muhammad and `Ali, Allah’s peace be upon them and their Household.
[The author of the book] Let me, the poor, refer to this tradition on this occasion:

Ibn Abi’l-Hadid has reported the following incident from Imam `Ali Amir al-Mu'minin (`a): One day, I asked the Holy Prophet (s) to implore God to forgive me. Responding to me, the Holy Prophet (s) stood up, offered a prayer, and raised his hands for supplicating. Listening carefully to him, I heard him saying:

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ بِحَقِّ عَلِيٍّ عِنْدَكَ ٱغْفِرْ لِعَلِيٍّ.

translation.en: O Allah, (I beseech You) in the name of `Ali’s standing with You, (please) forgive `Ali.

segments.arabic: فقلت يا رسول الله : ما هذا؟ فقال : أو أحد أكرم منك عليه فأستشفع به اليه

translation.en: Surprisingly, I said to him, “O Allah’s Messenger, what kind of supplication is this?” He (s) answered, “Can I find any other person who is dearer to Allah than you are so that I can beseech Him in his name?”

text.en: Her supplication after ritual Prayer seeking relief from sorrow and grief: It is narrated from Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) that: My mother, Lady Fatima Zahra (s.a.) used to offer a Prayer, which Jibraeel had brought. In the first of its two units Surah Hamd and Surah Qadr is recited and in the second unit, Surah Hamd once and Surah Tauheed a hundred times. After the Prayer, Tasbih of Lady Fatima (s.a.) is recited. After that the knees are exposed and placed on the Prayer mat and the following supplication is recited and after that one’s needs are sought. Then invoke blessings on the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.a.) and then supplicate as follows:

translation.en: In the name of Allah, the Beneficent, the Merciful
O God, I turn to You through the mediation of Muhammad and Progeny of Muhammad
and I adjure by that right of theirs,
whose reality is not known to anyone, except You.

segments.arabic: وَ بِحَقِّ مَنْ حَقُّهٗ عِنْدَكَ عَظِيْمٌ،
segments.transliteration: wa behaqqe man haqqohu i’ndaka a’zeemun,

translation.en: And I adjure by the rights of those,

segments.arabic: وَ بِاَسْمَائِكَ الْحُسْنٰى وَ كَلِمَاتِكَ التَّامَّاتِ الَّتِيْ اَمَرْتَنِيْ اَنْ اَدْعُوَكَ بِهَا،
segments.transliteration: wa be-asmaa-ekal husnaa wa kalemaatekat taammaatil latee amartanee an ad-o’oka behaa,

translation.en: whose right is great in your view and I adjure by your beautiful names and the perfect words through which You have commanded us to supplicate.

segments.arabic: وَ اَسْاَلُكَ بِاسْمِكَ الْعَظِيْمِ الَّذِيْ اَمَرْتَ اِبْرَاهِيْمَ - ؑ - اَنْ يَدْعُوَ بِهِ الطَّيْرَ فَاَجَابَتْهُ.
segments.transliteration: wa as-aloka bismekal a’zeemil lazee amarta ibraaheema – a’layhis salaamo – an yad-o’wa behit tayra fa-ajaabatho.

translation.en: And I adjure You by that name through which You commanded Ibrahim Khaleel to call the dead birds.

segments.arabic: وَ بِاسْمِكَ الْعَظِيْمِ الَّذِيْ قُلْتَ لِلنَّارِكُوْنِيْ بَرْدًا وَ سَلَامًا عَلٰى‏ اِبْراهِيْمَ فَكَانَتْ،
segments.transliteration: wa bismekal a’zeemil lazee qulta lin-naare koonee bardan wa salaaman a’laa ibraaheema fakaanat,

translation.en: And by that great name, which You blew on fire and made it cool and safe.

segments.arabic: وَ بِاَحَبِّ اَسْمَائِكَ اِلَيْكَ، وَ اَشْرَفِهَا عِنْدَكَ،
segments.transliteration: wa be-ahabbe asmaaeka elayka, wa ashrafehaa i’ndaka

translation.en: And by your most loved, noble and great names,

segments.arabic: وَ اَعْظَمِهَا لَدَيْكَ وَ اَسْرَعِهَا اِجَابَةً، وَ اَنْجَحِهَا طَلِبَةً،
segments.transliteration: wa a-a’zamehaa ladayka wa asra-e’haa ejaabatan,wa anjahehaa talebatan

translation.en: through which supplication is accepted immediately and needs are fulfilled

segments.arabic: وَ بِمَا اَنْتَ اَهْلُهٗ وَ مُسْتَحِقُّهٗ وَ مُسْتَوْجِبُهٗ.
segments.transliteration: wa bemaa anta ahlohu wa mustahiqqohu wa mustawjebohu.

translation.en: and which You are deserving of and owner of.

segments.arabic: وَ اَتَوَسَّلُ اِلَيْكَ، وَ اَرْغَبُ اِلَيْكَ،
segments.transliteration: wa atawassalo elayka, wa arghabo elayka,

translation.en: I seek mediation to You, I am attentive to You and I seek your help.
And I seek bestowal and favor;
and I am a petitioner;
and I am humble
and sincere before You,

segments.arabic: وَ اَخْشَعُ لَكَ وَ اُقِرُّ لَكَ بِسُوْءِ صَنِيْعَتِي،
segments.transliteration: wa akhsha-o’ laka wa oqirro laka be-soo-e sanee-a’tee,

translation.en: and I confess to my evil deeds .
and I insist and persist before You

segments.arabic: وَ اَسْاَلُكَ بِكُتُبِكَ الَّتِيْ اَنْزَلْتَهَا عَلٰى اَنْبِيَائِكَ وَ رُسُلِكَ،
segments.transliteration: wa as-aloka bekotobekal latee anzaltahaa a’laa anbeyaa-eka wa rosoleka,

translation.en: I adjure by your Books that You revealed on the prophets and messengers
(your blessings and mercy be on them all).

segments.arabic: مِنَ التَّوْرَاةِ وَ الْاِنْجِيْلِ وَ الْقُرْآنِ الْعَظِيْمِ،
segments.transliteration: menat tawraate wal injeele wal qur-aanil a’zeeme,

translation.en: That is Taurat, Injeel and the great Quran
from its beginning till its end.
As it contains your great name and your beautiful names,

segments.arabic: وَ بِمَا فِيْهَا مِنْ اَسْمَائِكَ الْعُظْمٰى اَتَقَرَّبُ اِلَيْكَ،
segments.transliteration: wa bemaa feehaa min asmaa-ekal u’zmaa ataqarrabo elayka,

translation.en: through which I seek your proximity.

segments.arabic: وَ اَسْاَلُكَ اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ اٰلِهٖ،
segments.transliteration: wa as-aloka an tosalleya a’laa mohammadin wa aalehi,

translation.en: I beseech You to bless Muhammad and progeny of Muhammad and remove their grief and sorrow and through their intercession,

segments.arabic: وَ اَنْ تُفَرِّجَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ اٰلِهٖ وَ تَجْعَلَ فَرَجِيْ مَقْرُوْنًا بِفَرَجِهِمْ،
segments.transliteration: wa an tofarreja a’n mohammadin wa aalehi wa taj-a’la farajee maqroonan be-farajehim,

translation.en: remove my grief and sorrow as well,

segments.arabic: (وَ تُقَدِّمَهُمْ فِيْ كُلِّ خَيْرٍ) وَ تَبْدَاَ بِهِمْ فِيْهِ،
segments.transliteration: (wa toqaddemahum fee kulle khayrin) wa tabda-a behim feehe,

translation.en: and keep them at the forefront in every good,

segments.arabic: وَ تَفْتَحَ اَبْوَابَ السَّمَاءِ لِدُعَائِيْ فِيْ هٰذَا الْيَوْمِ،
segments.transliteration: wa taftaha abwaabas samaa-e le-do-a’a-ee fee haazal yawme,

translation.en: and begin this only with them and today open the gates of heavens for my supplications

segments.arabic: وَ تَاْذَنَ فِيْ هٰذَا الْيَوْمِ وَ هٰذِهِ اللَّيْلَةِ بِفَرَجِيْ،
segments.transliteration: wa taazana fee haazal yawme wa haazehil laylate befarajee,

translation.en: and today and tonight command peace for me

segments.arabic: وَ اِعْطَائِيْ سُؤْلِيْ وَ اَمَلِیْ فِيْ الدُّنْيَا وَ الْاٰخِرَةِ،
segments.transliteration: wa e-a’taa-ee soalee wa amalee fid dunyaa wal aakherate,

translation.en: and fulfillment of all my demands as
poverty has besieged me
and difficulties surround me.

segments.arabic: وَ سَلَّمَتْنِي الْخَصَاصَةُ وَ اَلْجَاَتْنِيْ الْحَاجَةُ،
segments.transliteration: wa salla-matnil khasaasato wa al-ja-atnil haajato,

translation.en: Needs have turned me over to You and needs have made me a refugee.
Humiliation has targeted
and poverty had overpowered,
and your word is proved true
and mistakes have surrounded me.

segments.arabic: وَ هٰذَا الْوَقْتُ الَّذِيْ وَعَدْتَ اَوْلِيَاءَكَ فِيْهِ الْاِجَابَةَ.
segments.transliteration: wa haazal waqtul lazee wa-a’dta awleyaa-aka feehil ejaabata.

translation.en: This is the time, when You promised acceptance to your friends.
bless Muhammad and progeny of Muhammad

segments.arabic: وَ امْسَحْ مَا بِيْ بِيَمِيْنِكَ الشَّافِيَةِ،
segments.transliteration: wam sah maa bee be-yameenekash shaafeyate,

translation.en: and remove my difficulties through your curative hands
and look upon me with mercy
and admit me in your wide mercy.

segments.arabic: وَ اَقْبِلْ اِلَيَّ بِوَجْهِكَ الَّذِيْ اِذَا اَقْبَلْتَ بِهٖ عَلٰى اَسِيْرٍ فَكَكْتَهٗ،
segments.transliteration: wa aqbil elayya be-wajhekal lazee ezaa aq-balta behi a’laa aseerin fakaktahu,

translation.en: Turn your towards me, which if it is turned to the prisoner, he is freed.
And if it is turned to the misguided, he becomes guided.

segments.arabic: وَ عَلٰى جَائِزٍ اَدَّيْتَهٗ وَ عَلٰى فَقِیْرٍ اَغْنَيْتَهٗ،
segments.transliteration: wa a’laa jaa-ezin addaytahu wa a’laa faqeerin aghnaytahu,

translation.en: And if it is turned to the perplexed, he is freed from perplexity. And if it is turned to the destitute, he becomes affluent.
If it is turned to the weak, he becomes strong.
If it is turned to the fearful, he is granted security.

segments.arabic: وَ لَا تُخْلِنِيْ لِقَاءَ عَدُوِّكَ وَ عَدُوِّيْ،
segments.transliteration: wa laa tukhlenee leqaa-a a’duwweka wa a’duwwee,

translation.en: O God, allow my and your enemy to meet me,
O owner of might and majesty.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا يَعْلَمُ كَيْفَ هُوَ،
segments.transliteration: yaa man laa ya’lamo kayfa howa,

translation.en: O One, whose reality, position

segments.arabic: وَ حَيْثُ هُوَ وَ قُدْرَتَهٗ اِلَّا هُوَ،
segments.transliteration: wa hayso howa wa qudratahu illaa howa,

translation.en: and power is not known to anyone,except Him
O One, who has confined the atmosphere by the sky
and placed the earth on water
and chose the best names for Himself.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ سَمّٰى نَفْسَهٗ بِالْاِسْمِ الَّذِيْ بِهٖ تَقْضِيْ حَاجَةَ كُلِّ طَالِبٍ يَدْعُوْهُ بِهٖ.
segments.transliteration: yaa man sammaa nafsahu bil-ismil lazee behi taqzee haajata kulle taalebin yad-o’oho behi.

translation.en: O that God, who adopted for Himself every that name through which He fulfills the needs of all those, who pray through them.
I beseech You through the mediation of your names
as I have no intercessor stronger than this.

segments.arabic: وَ بِحَقِّ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ اٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ (اَسْاَلُكَ) اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ اٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ،
segments.transliteration: wa be-haqqe mohammadin wa aale mohammadin (as-aloka) an tosalleya a’laa mohammadin wa aale mohammadin,

translation.en: And I adjure You by the right of Muhammad and progeny of Muhammad that You bless Muhammad and progeny of Muhammad
and fulfill all my pleas.

segments.arabic: وَ تُسْمِعَ مُحَمَّدًا وَ عَلِيًّا وَ فَاطِمَةَ،
segments.transliteration: wa tusme-a’ mohammadan wa a’liyyan wa faatemata,

translation.en: And make my plea reach upto His Eminence Muhammad, Ali Fatima

segments.arabic: وَ الْحَسَنَ وَ الْحُسَيْنَ وَ عَلِيًّا وَ مُحَمَّدًا،
segments.transliteration: wal hasana wal husayna wa a’liyyan wa mohammadan,

translation.en: Hassan Hussain Ali Muhammad
Jafar Musa

segments.arabic: وَ عَلِيًّا وَ مُحَمَّدًا وَ عَلِيًّا،
segments.transliteration: wa a’liyyan wa mohammadan wa a’liyyan,

translation.en: Ali Muhammad Ali

segments.arabic: وَ الْحَسَنَ وَ الْحُجَّةَ - صَلَوَاتُكَ عَلَيْهِمْ وَ بَرَكَاتُكَ وَ رَحْمَتُكَ – صَوْتِيْ،
segments.transliteration: wal hasana wal hujjata – salawaatoka a’layhim wa barakaatoka wa rahmatoka – sawtee,

translation.en: Hasan and Hujjat Qaim [your blessings and mercy be on them all],

segments.arabic: فَيَشْفَعُوْا لِيْ اِلَيْكَ وَ تُشَفِّعَهُمْ فِيَّ،
segments.transliteration: fayashfa-o’o lee elayka wa toshaf-fe-a’hum fiyya,

translation.en: so that they may be able to recommend my case in your court and You allow them to intercede for me.
And don’t turn me away in despair,
I adjure You by ‘there is no god, except Allah’ and

segments.arabic: وَ بِحَقِّ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ اٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ،
segments.transliteration: wa be-haqqe mohammadin wa aale mohammadin,

translation.en: I adjure You by Muhammad and progeny of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: صَلِّ عَلٰی مُحَمَّدٍ وَ اٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ،
segments.transliteration: salle a’laa mohammadin wa aale mohammadin,

translation.en: Bless Muhammad and his progeny

segments.arabic: وَ افْعَلْ بِيْ ’’كَذَا وَ كَذَا‘‘ يَا كَرِيْمُ.
segments.transliteration: waf a’l bee ‘kazaa wa kazaa’ yaa kareemo.

translation.en: conduct with me ‘as follows’, O merciful God.

name: A Dua to repel the enemies’ plots

translation.en: 1.O God, You created me without fault,
2.nurtured me when small, and provided me with sufficiency.

segments.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ إنِّي وَجَدْتُ فِيمَا أَنْزَلْتَ مِنْ كِتَابِكَ،

translation.en: 3.O God, I found in the Book which You sent down
4.and through which You gave good news to Your servants,

segments.arabic: أَنْ قُلْتَ: (يا عِبَادِيَ الَّذِينَ أَسْرَفُوا عَلَى أَنْفُسِهِمْ

translation.en: 5.that You said, O My servants who hare been prodigal against yourselves,

segments.arabic: لاَ تَقْنَطُوا مِنْ رَحْمَةِ اللهِ إنَّ اللهَ يَغْفِرُ الذُّنُوبَ جَمِيعاً)

translation.en: 6.do not despair of God's mercy, surely God forgives all sins,

segments.arabic: وَقَدْ تَقَدَّمَ مِنِّي مَا قَدْ عَلِمْتَ،

translation.en: 7.but there has gone ahead from me what You knowest
8.(and of which You knowest more than I)!

segments.arabic: فَيَا سَوْأَتا مِمَّا أَحْصَاهُ عَلَيَّ كِتَابُكَ،

translation.en: 9.O the shame of what Your Book has counted against me!

segments.arabic: فَلَوْلاَ الْمَوَاقِفُ الَّتِي أُؤَمِّلُ مِنْ عَفْوِكَ

translation.en: 10.Were it not for the places where I expectantly hope for Your pardon,

segments.arabic: الَّذِي شَمِلَ كُلَّ شَيْء لاَلْقَيْتُ بِيَدِي،

translation.en: 11.which enfolds all things, I would have thrown myself down [in despair]!
12.Were anyone able to flee from his Lord,

segments.arabic: مِنْ رَبِّهِ لَكُنْتُ أَنَا أَحَقُّ بِالهَرَبِ،

translation.en: 13.I would be the most obligated to flee from You!

segments.arabic: وَأَنْتَ لاَ تَخْفَى عَلَيْكَ خَافِيَةٌ فِي الاَرْضِ

translation.en: 14.But not a secret in earth and heaven is concealed from You,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ فِي السَّمَآءِ إلاَّ أَتَيْتَ بِهَا،

translation.en: 15.except that You bringest it.

segments.arabic: وَكَفى بِكَ جَازِياً، وَكَفى بِكَ حَسِيباً.

translation.en: 16.You sufficest as a recompenser! You sufficest as a reckoner!

segments.arabic: أللَّهُمَّ إنَّكَ طَالِبِي إنْ أَنَا هَرَبْتُ،

translation.en: 17.O God, surely You wouldst seek me if I flee
18.and catch me if I run.

segments.arabic: فَهَا أَنَا ذَا بَيْنَ يَدَيْكَ خَاضِعٌ ذَلِيلٌ رَاغِمٌ،

translation.en: 19.So here I am before You, abject, lowly, abased.
20.If You chastisest me, I am worthy of that,
21.and it would be, my Lord, an act of justice from You.

segments.arabic: وَإنْ تَعْفُ عَنِّي فَقَدِيماً شَمَلَنِي عَفْوُكَ،

translation.en: 22.But if You pardonest me, anciently has Your pardon enfolded me
23.and Your well-being garmented me!
24.So I ask You, O God, by Your names stored in Your treasury
25.and Your splendour masked by the veils!
26.If You hast no mercy upon this anxious soul
27.and these uneasy, decaying bones -
28.he cannot endure the heat of Your sun,
29.so how can he endure the heat of Your Fire?
30.He cannot endure the sound of Your thunder,
31.so how can he endure the sound of Your wrath?

segments.arabic: فَارْحَمْنِي اللَّهُمَّ فَإنِّي امْرُؤٌ حَقِيرٌ، وَخَطَرِي يَسِيرٌ،

translation.en: 32.So have mercy upon me, O God, for I am a vile man and my worth is little.

segments.arabic: وَلَيْسَ عَذَابِي مِمَّا يَزِيدُ فِي مُلْكِكَ مِثْقَالَ ذَرَّة،

translation.en: 33.Chastising me will not add the weight of a dust mote to Your kingdom.

segments.arabic: وَلَوْ أَنَّ عَذَابِي مِمَّا يَزِيدُ فِي مُلْكِكَ

translation.en: 34.Were chastising me something that would add to Your kingdom,
35.I would ask You for patience to bear it
36.and would love for it to belong to You;
37.but Your authority, my God, is mightier,

segments.arabic: وَمُلْكُكَ أَدْوَمُ مِنْ أَنْ تَزِيـدَ فِيْهِ طَاعَةُ الْمُطِيعِينَ،

translation.en: 38.and Your kingdom more lasting, than that the obedience of the obeyers should increase it
39.or the disobedience of the sinners diminish it!
40.So have mercy upon me, O Most Merciful of the merciful!

segments.arabic: وَتَجاوَزْ عَنِّي يا ذَا الْجَلاَلِ وَالإكْرَامِ،

translation.en: 41.Show me forbearance, O Possessor of majesty and munificence!

segments.arabic: وَتُبْ عَلَيَّ إنَّكَ أَنْتَ التَّوَّابُ الرَّحِيمُ.

translation.en: 42.And turn toward me, Surely You art Ever-turning, All-compassionate!

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنَّ ظُلْمَ عِبَادِكَ قَدْ تَمَكَّنَ فِي بِلاَدِكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inna zulma `ibadika qad tamakkana fi biladika

translation.en: O Allah, the persecutions against Your servant have become so prevalent in Your lands
that it has put an end to justice,
interrupted all ways,
eradicated the right,
thwarted truthfulness,
enshrouded charity,
demonstrated evil,
extinguished piety,
removed true guidance,
dislodged decency,
planted harm,
promoted corruption,
strengthened obstinacy,
spread out prejudice,
and exceeded all bounds.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ يَا رَبِّ لاَ يَكْشِفُ ذٰلِكَ إِلاَّ سُلْطَانُكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma ya rabbi layakshifu dhalika illasultanuka

translation.en: O Allah! O my Lord, nothing can eliminate all that except Your authority
and nothing can deliver from it except Your obliging favors.
O Allah! O my Lord, (please) mutilate persecution,
demolish the mountains of oppression,
stagnate the business of evil,
grant victory to those who deter from it,
harvest the roots of the people of prejudice,
and attire them with shrinkage after escalation.
O Allah, afflict them with inaction immediately,
send down on them exemplary punishments,
and put to death the life of wickedness
so that the terrorized will be secured,
the terrified will calm down,
the hungry will become full,
the lost will be guarded,
the fugitive will find a place of settlement,
the escapee will return home,
the poor will be satisfied,
the refugee will be sheltered,
the old will be respected,
the infants will be shown mercy,
the wronged will be treated fairly,
the wrongdoers will be humiliated,
the distressed will be relieved,
the agonies will be driven away,
the populace will find rest,
discrepancy will be wiped out,
knowledge will be exalted,
peace will be prevalent,
dispersion will be amassed,
faith will be strengthened,
and the Qur'an will be practically recited.
Verily, You are the Master, the Munificent, and the Favorer.
In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي اعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ مُلِمَّاتِ نَوَازِلِ ٱلْبَلاَءِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni a`udhu bika min mulimmati nawazili albala'i

translation.en: O Allah, I pray Your protection against the striking mishaps of tribulation
and the horrors of the unbearable adversities.
So, O my Lord, protect me against the blows of affliction,
veil me from the sways of ordeals,
save me from the surprising punishments,
and shelter me against the removal of blessings
and the slipping of steps.
O Allah, make me inside the fence of Your almightiness
and the barrier of Your haven
against unexpected overtaking of calamities
and against the swift sudden misfortunes.

segments.transliteration: allahumma rabbi wa arda albala'i fakhsifha

translation.en: O Allah; O my Lord, (please) cause the lands of ordeals to sink down,
cause the yards of crises to quake,
cast a shadow on the sun of misfortunes,
uproot the mountains of evil,
remove the vicissitudes of times,
and drive back the obstacles in all affairs.
(Please) take me to the ponds of safety,
carry me on the riding animals of honor,
make Your excuse of my slips to be my companion,
and include me with Your covering of my defects.
O my Lord, grant me liberally Your elegances,
Your removal of my tribulations,
and Your fending off of my adversities.
(Please) ward off from me the thoraxes of Your chastisement,
repel from me Your painful punishment,
safeguard me from the ups and downs of days,
rescue me from the evil end results of affairs,
guard me against all anticipated matters,
split the rock of tribulation in my affairs,
and paralyze its hand lest it reaches me as long as I am alive.
Verily, You are the All-glorious lord
Who originates, reproduces,
and does whatever He wants.

name: Amulet of the Messenger of Allah (P.B.U.H.)

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ الرَّحْمٰنِ الرَّحِيْمِ، اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّيْ اَعُوْذُ بِاسْمِكَ وَ كَلِمَتِكَ التَّامَّةِ مِنْ شَرِّ السَّامَّةِ و الْهَامَّةِ وَ اَعُوْذُ بِاسْمِكَ و كَلِمَتِكَ التَّامَّةِ مِنْ شَرِّ عِذَاتِك (عَذَابِكَ خ ل) وَ شَرِّ عِبَادِكَ وَ اَعُوْذُ بِاسْمِكَ وَ كَلِمَتِكَ التَّامَّةِ مِنْ شَرِّ الشَّيْطَانِ الرَّجِيْمِ، اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّيْ اَسْاَلُكَ بِاسْمِكَ وَ كَلِمَتِكَ التَّامَّةِ مِنْ خَيْرِ مَا تُعْطِىْ وَ مَا تُسْاَلُ وَ خَيْرَ مَا تُخْفِىْ وَ مَا تُبْدِىْ اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّیْ اَعُوْذُ بِاسْمِكَ وَ كَلِمَتِكَ التَّامَّةِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا يَجرِىْ بِهِ اللَّيْلُ وَ النَّهَارُ إِنَّ رَبِّیَ اللهُ الَّذِىْ لاَ اِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اَنْتَ هُوَ…
segments.transliteration: Bismillaahir rah’maanir rah’eem. Allaahumma innee ao’o’dhu bismika wa kalimatikat taaammati min sharris saaammati wal haaammati wa ao’o’dhu bismika wa kalimatikat taaammati min sharri i’dhaatika (a’dhaabika) wa sharri i’baadika wa a’oodhu bismika wa kalimatikat taaammati min sharrish shait’aanir rajeem. Allaahumma innee as-aluka bismika wa kalimatikat taaammati min khairi maa tu’t’ee wa maa tus-alu wa khaira maa tukhfee wa maa tubdee allaahumma innee ao’o’dhu bismika wa kalimatikat taaammati min sharri maa yajree bihil lailu wan nahaaru inna rabbiyallaahal ladhee laa ilaaha illaa anta huwa…

translation.en: In the name of Allah, the Beneficent, the Merciful. O Allah, indeed I seek refuge by Your name and Your perfect word from the evil of the poisonous creatures and reptiles and I seek refuge by Your name and Your beneficial word from the evil of Your punishment and the evil of Your creatures and I seek refuge by Your name and Your perfect word from the evil of the Satan, the accursed one. O Allah I indeed ask You by Your name and Your perfect word from the good that You bestowed me and that which you are asked and the best of that You conceal and that You make apparent. O Allah indeed I seek refuge by Your name and Your perfect Word from the evil of that which moves in the night and the day. Indeed my Lord is Allah. One Who there is no god except You…

segments.arabic: عَلَيْهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ وَ هُوَ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيْمِ مَا شَآءَ اللهُ كَانَ اَنْتَ رَبِّىْ لاَ اِلٰهَ اِلاَّ اَنْتَ عَلَيْكَ تَوَكَّلْتُ وَ اَنْتَ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيْمِ لاَ حَوْلَ وَ لاَ قُوَّةَ اِلاَّ بِاللهِ الْعَلِىِّ الْعَظِيْمِ مَا شَاءَ اللهُ كَانَ وَ مَا لَمْ يَشَاَ لَمْ يَكُنْ اَعْلَمُ اَنَّ اللهَ عَلٰی كُلِّ شَىْءٍ قَدِيْرٌ وَ اَنَّ اللهَ قَدْ اَحَاطَ بِكُلِّ شَىْءٍ عِلْمًا وَ اَحْصٰى كُلَّ شَىْءٍ عَدَدًا، اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّیْ اَعُوْذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ نَفْسِىْ وَ مِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ دَابَّةٍ اَنْتَ آخِذٌ بِنَاصِيَتِهَا إِنَّ رَبِّىْ عَلٰی صِرَاطٍ مُّسْتَقِيْمٍ فَإِنْ تَوَلَّوْا فَقُلْ حَسْبِىَ اللهُ لاَ اِلٰهَ إِلاَّ هُوَ عَلَيْهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ وَ هُوَ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيْمِ.
segments.transliteration: a’laihi tawakkaltu wa huwa Rabbul a’rshil a’z’eem. Maa shaa allaahu kaana anta rabbee laa ilaaha illaa anta a’laika tawakkaltu wa anta Rabbul a’rshil a’z’eem. Laa h’aula wa laa quwwata illaa billaahil a’leeyil a’z’eem. Maa shaa allaahu kaana wa maa lam yasha-a lam yakun aa’lamu annallaaha a’laa kulli shai-in qadeerunw wa annallaaha qad ah’aat’a bikulli shai-in i’lmanw wa ah’s’aa kulli shai-in a’dadaa. Allaahumma innee ao’o’dhubika min sharri nafsee wa min sharri kulli daaabbatin anta aakhadhum binaas’iyatihaa inna rabbee a’laa s’iraatim mustaqeemin fa-in tawallau faqul h’asbiyallaahu laa ilaaha illaa huwa a’laihi tawakkaltu wa huwa Rabbul a’rshil a’z’eem.

translation.en: He is that upon whom I rely and He is the Lord of the mighty throne. As Allah willed happened. You are my Lord. There is no god except You. I rely upon You and You are the Lord of the mighty throne. There is no power and strength except by Allah, the Exalted and the Mighty. Whatever Allah desired happened and what He does not want would not happen. I am aware that Allah is powerful over everything. And indeed Allah has encompassed everything in knowledge and calculated everything numerically. O Allah indeed I seek refuge by You from the evil of my self and from the evil of every moving creature. You hold its forelocks. Indeed my Lord is on the straight path. So if they turn their backs, say: Allah is sufficient for me. There is no god except Him. Upon Him I rely and He is the Lord of the mighty throne.

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ اللّٰهِ الرَّحْمٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ، يَا حَيُّ يَا قَيُّوْمُ، بِرَحْمَتِكَ أَسْتَغِيثُ، فَأَغِثْنِي وَلَا تَكِلْنِي إِلىٰ نَفْسِي طَرْفَةَ عَيْنٍ أَبَداً، وَأَصْلِحْ لِي شَأْنِي كُلَّهُ.
segments.transliteration: Bismillaahir rah’maanir rah’eem. Yaa h’ayyu yaa qayyoomu birah’matika astagheethu fa-aghithnee wa laa takilnee ilaa nafsee t’arfata a’inin abadanw wa as’lih’ lee shaa-nee kulloh.

translation.en: In the name of Allah, the Beneficent, the Merciful. O Living, O everlasting by Your mercy, I entreat. Then help me and do not desert me to my self even for the twinkle of the eye ever. And reform my condition, all of it.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ بِتَأَلُّقِ نُوْرِ بَهَاءِ عَرْشِكَ مِنْ اَعْدَائِیْ اسْتَتَرْتُ وَ بِسَطْوَةِ الْجَبْرُوْتِ مِنْ كَمَالِ عِزِّكَ مِمَّنْ يَكيْدُوْنِيْ اِحْتَجَبْتُ وَ بِسُلْطَانِكَ الْعَظِيْمِ مِنْ شَرِّ كُلَّ سُلْطَانٍ وَ شَيْطَانٍ اِسْتَعَذْتُ وَ مِنْ فَرَائِضِ نِعمَتِكَ وَ جَزِيْلِ عَطِيَّتِكَ يَا مَوْلاَىَ طَلَبْتُ كَيْفَ اَخَافُ وَ اَنْتَ اَمَلِىْ وَ كَيْفَ اَضَامُ وَ عَلَيْكَ مُتَّكَلِىْ اَسْلَمْتُ إِلَيْكَ نَفْسِىْ وَ فَوَّضْتُ إِلَيْكَ اَمْرِىْ وَ تَوَكَّلْتُ فِىْ كُلِّ اَحْوَالِىْ عَلَيْكَ صَلِّ عَلٰی مُحَمَّدٍ…
segments.transliteration: Allaahumma bi taalluqi noori bahaa-i a’rshika min aa’daa-ee astatartu wa bisat’watil jabarooti min kamaali i’zzika mimmayn yakaidoonee ih’tajabtu wa bis’ult’aanikal a’z’eemi min sharri kulla sult’aaninw wa shait’aanin ista-a’dhtu wa min faraa-iz”i ni’matika wa jazeeli a’t’eeyatika yaa maulaaya t’alabtu kaifa akhaafu wa anta Amali wa kaifa az”aamu wa a’laika muttakalee aslamtu ilaika nafsee wa fawwaz”tu ilaika amree wa tawakkaltu fee kulli ah’waalee a’laika s’alli a’laa muh’ammadinw…

translation.en: O Allah! By the brilliance of the light of the magnificence of Your throne I conceal myself from my enemies. By the power of force of the perfection of Your might I protect myself from those who conspire against me. And by Your great power from the evil of all the rulers and Satans I seek refuge and from the full bestowals and bounty, O Master I ask. How can I fear when You are my hope and how could I be oppressed while I rely on You. I submit to You myself and entrust my affair to You and I rely in all my conditions on You. Bless Muhammad…

segments.arabic: وَ اشْفِنِيْ وَ اكْفِنِيْ وَ اغْلِبْ لِىْ مَنْ غَلَبَنِيْ يَا غَالِبًا غَيْرَ مَغْلُوْبٍ زَجَرْتُ كُلَّ رَاصِدٍ رَصَدَ وَ مَارِدٍ مَرَدَ وَ حَاسِدٍ حَسَدَ وَ عَانِدٍ عَنَدَ بِبِسْمِ اللهِ الرَّحْمٰنِ الرَّحِيْمِ قُلْ هُوَ اللهُ اَحَدُ اللهُ الصَّمَدُ لَمْ يَلِدْ وَ لَمْ يُوْلَدْ وَ لَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ كُفُوًا اَحَدٌ كَذَالِكَ اللهُ رَبُّنَا حَسْبُنَا اللهِ وَ نِعْمَ الْوَكِيْلِ إنَّهُ قَوِّىٌّ مُعِيْنٌ.
segments.transliteration: wa ashfinee wakfinee waghlib lee man ghalabanee yaa ghaaliban ghaira maghloob. Zajartu kulla raas’idinr ras’ada wa maaridim marada wa h’aasidin h’asada wa a’a’nidin a’nada bi bismillaahir rah’maanir rah’eem. Qulhuwallaahu ah’ad. Allaahus’ s’amad. Lam yalid wa lam yoolad. Wa lam ya kullahu kufwan ah’ad. Kadhaalikallaahu rabbunaa h’asbunallaahi wa ni’mal wakeeli innahu qawweeyum mue’e’n.

translation.en: and cure me and help me and give me dominance from all those who dominate me. O the dominant One, Whom none dominates. I drive away every ambusher that ambushed and every rebel that rebelled, every jealous one that is jealous and every foe that is inimical by: In the name of Allah the Beneficent the Merciful. He, Allah, is One. Allah is He on Whom all depend. He begets not, nor is He begotten. And none is like Him. Such is Allah our Lord. Allah is sufficient for us and the best of the helpers. Indeed He is the Powerful helper.
