segments.arabic: بِسْمِ اللّٰهِ الرَّحْمٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ، بِسْمِ اللّٰهِ وَبِاللّٰهِ، سَدَدْتُ أَفْواهَ الْجِنِّ وَالْإِنْسِ‌ وَ الشَّياطِينِ وَالسَّحَرَةِ، وَالْأَبالِسَةِ مِنَ الْجِنِّ وَالْإِنْسِ وَالسَّلاطِينِ وَمَنْ يَلُوذُ بِهِمْ، بِاللّٰهِ الْعَزِيزِ الْأَعَزِّ، وَبِاللّٰهِ الْكَبِيرِ الْأَكْبَرِ، بِسْمِ اللّٰهِ الظَّاهِرِ الْباطِنِ الْمَكْنُونِ الْمَخْزُونِ الَّذِي أَقامَ بِهِ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ، ثُمَّ اسْتَوَىٰ عَلَى الْعَرْشِ، بِسْمِ اللّٰهِ الرَّحْمٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ، ﴿وَ وَقَعَ الْقَوْلُ عَلَيْهِمْ بِمٰا ظَلَمُوا فَهُمْ لاٰ يَنْطِقُونَ﴾، ﴿قٰالَ اخْسَؤُا فِيهٰا وَ لاٰ تُكَلِّمُونِ﴾؛

translation.en: In the name of God, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful. In the name of God, and with God, I shut the mouths of the jinn and mankind, the devils and sorcerers, and the devils from among the jinn and mankind, and the rulers and those who seek refuge with them. With God, the Almighty, the Most Powerful, and with God, the Great, the Most Great. In the name of God, the Manifest, the Hidden, the Hidden, the Stored, by whom He established the heavens. And the earth, then He established Himself on the Throne. In the name of God, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful. And the word has come to pass against them because of what they did wrong, so they do not speak. He said, “Get out of here and disgrace yourself and do not speak to Me.”

segments.arabic: ﴿وَ عَنَتِ الْوُجُوهُ لِلْحَيِّ الْقَيُّومِ وَ قَدْ خٰابَ مَنْ حَمَلَ ظُلْماً﴾، ﴿وَ خَشَعَتِ الْأَصْوٰاتُ لِلرَّحْمٰنِ فَلاٰ تَسْمَعُ إِلاّٰ هَمْساً﴾، ﴿وَ جَعَلْنٰا عَلىٰ قُلُوبِهِمْ أَكِنَّةً أَنْ يَفْقَهُوهُ، وَ فِي آذٰانِهِمْ وَقْراً، وَ إِذٰا ذَكَرْتَ رَبَّكَ فِي الْقُرْآنِ وَحْدَهُ وَلَّوْا عَلىٰ أَدْبٰارِهِمْ نُفُوراً﴾، ﴿وَ إِذٰا قَرَأْتَ الْقُرْآنَ جَعَلْنٰا بَيْنَكَ وَ بَيْنَ الَّذِينَ لاٰ يُؤْمِنُونَ بِالْآخِرَةِ حِجٰاباً مَسْتُوراً﴾، ﴿وَ جَعَلْنٰا مِنْ بَيْنِ أَيْدِيهِمْ سَدًّا وَ مِنْ خَلْفِهِمْ سَدًّا فَأَغْشَيْنٰاهُمْ فَهُمْ لاٰ يُبْصِرُونَ﴾، ﴿اَلْيَوْمَ نَخْتِمُ عَلىٰ أَفْوٰاهِهِمْ وَ تُكَلِّمُنٰا أَيْدِيهِمْ﴾ ﴿فَهُمْ لاٰ يَنْطِقُونَ﴾، ﴿لَوْ أَنْفَقْتَ مٰا فِي الْأَرْضِ جَمِيعاً مٰا أَلَّفْتَ بَيْنَ قُلُوبِهِمْ، وَ لٰكِنَّ اللّٰهَ أَلَّفَ بَيْنَهُمْ إِنَّهُ عَزِيزٌ حَكِيمٌ﴾، وَصَلَّى اللّٰهُ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِهِ الطَّاهِرِينَ.

translation.en: {And faces will be humbled before the Ever-Living, the Self-Sustaining, and he who bears injustice will fail.} {And voices will be hushed before the Most Merciful, so you will hear nothing but a whisper.} {And We have placed coverings over their hearts, lest they understand it, and deafness in their ears. And when you mention your Lord alone in the Qur’an, they turn their backs in aversion.} {And When you recite the Qur’an, We have placed between you and those who do not believe in the Hereafter an invisible veil. And We have placed before them a barrier and behind them a barrier and covered them so they do not see. Today We will seal up their mouths, and their hands will speak to Us, so they will not speak. If you spent “There is nothing on earth that You have not brought together their hearts, but it is Allah who has brought them together. Indeed, He is Exalted in Might and Wise.” And may God’s prayers and peace be upon Muhammad and his pure family.

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ اللّٰهِ الرَّحْمٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ، يَا خالِقَ الْخَلْقِ، وَيَا باسِطَ الرِّزْقِ، وَيَا فالِقَ الْحَبِّ، وَيَا بارِئَ النَّسَمِ، وَمُحْيِيَ الْمَوْتَىٰ، وَمُمِيتَ الْأَحْياءِ، وَدائِمَ الثَّباتِ، وَمُخْرِجَ النَّباتِ، افْعَلْ بِي مَا أَنْتَ أَهْلُهُ، وَلَا تَفْعَلْ بِي مَا أَنَا أَهْلُهُ، وَأَنْتَ أَهْلُ التَّقْوَىٰ وَأَهْلُ الْمَغْفِرَةِ.
segments.transliteration: Bismillaahir rah’maanir rah’eem. Yaa khaaliqal khalqi wa yaa baasit’ar rizq. Yaa faaliqAl h’abbi wa yaa baaree-an nasam. Wa muh’yYIAl mauta wa mumeetal ah’yaaIA. Wa daa-imath thabaati mukhrijan nabaat. If-a’l beeMAA anta ahluhu wa LAA TAF-A’L BAA MAA ANAA AHLUHU anta ahlut taqwaa wa ahlul maghfirah.

translation.en: In the name of Allah, the Beneficent, the Merciful. O Creator O Creator and O widener of sustenance and O splitter of the seed. And O One that makes the breeze blow. And the enlivener of the dead and the giver of death to the living. And the ever steadfast, and the grower of vegetation. Deal with me according to what befits You and do not deal with me as I deserve. And You are deserving of piety and You are Whom forgiveness befits.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي كَمْ مِنْ عَدُوٍّ شَحَذَ لِي ظُبَةَ مُدْيَتِهِ، وَأَرْهَفَ لِي شَبا حَدِّهِ، وَدافَ لِي قَواتِلَ سُمُومِهِ، وَلَمْ تَنَمْ عَنِّي عَيْنُ حِراسَتِهِ، فَلَمَّا رَأَيْتَ ضَعْفِي عَنِ احْتِمالِ الْفَوادِحِ ، وَعَجْزِي عَنْ مُلِمَّاتِ الْجَوائِحِ، صَرَفْتَ ذٰلِكَ عَنِّي بِحَوْلِكَ وَقُوَّتِكَ، لَابِحَوْلٍ مِنِّي وَلَا قُوَّةٍ، فَأَلْقَيْتَهُ فِي الْحَفِيرِ الَّذِي احْتَفَرَهُ لِي خائِباً مِمَّا أَمَّلَهُ فِي الدُّنْيا، مُتَباعِداً مِمَّا رَجاهُ فِي الْآخِرَةِ، فَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ عَلَىٰ ذٰلِكَ قَدْرَ اسْتِحْقاقِكَ سَيِّدِي .

translation.en: O God, how many an enemy has sharpened his dagger for me, sharpened his blade for me, and prepared for me the furthest reaches of his poisonous weapons, yet his watchful eye never slept on me. But when You saw my weakness in bearing calamities and my inability to face the calamities of disasters, You turned that away from me with Your power and strength—without any power or strength from me—and You cast him into the pit he had dug for me, disappointed in what he had provided. He placed his hopes in this world, far from what he hoped for in the Hereafter, so praise be to You for that as much as You deserve, my Master.

segments.arabic: اللّٰهُمَّ فَخُذْهُ بِعِزَّتِكَ، وَافْلُلْ حَدَّهُ عَنِّي بِقُدْرَتِكَ، وَاجْعَلْ لَهُ شُغْلاً فِيما يَلِيهِ، وَعَجْزاً عَمَّا يُناوِيهِ . اللّٰهُمَّ وَأَعْدِنِي عَلَيْهِ عَدْوَىً حاضِرَةً، تَكُونُ مِنْ غَيْظِي شِفاءً، وَمِنْ حَنَقِي عَلَيْهِ وَقاءً، وَصِلِ اللّٰهُمَّ دُعائِي بِالْإِجابَةِ، وَانْظِمْ شِكايَتِي بِالتَّغْيِيرِ، وَعَرِّفْهُ عَمَّا قَلِيلٍ مَا أَوْعَدْتَ الظَّالِمِينَ، وَعَرِّفْنِي مَا وَعَدْتَ فِي إِجابَةِ الْمُضْطَرِّينَ، إِنَّكَ ذُو الْفَضْلِ الْعَظِيمِ، وَالْمَنِّ الْكَرِيمِ.

translation.en: O Allah, take him by Your might, remove his punishment from me by Your power, and make him busy with what is next to him and helpless against what he intends. O Allah, restore to me a present contagion against him, that will be a cure for my rage and a protection from my anger toward him. O Allah, answer my prayer, and resolve my complaint with change. Let him know, in a little while, what You have promised the wrongdoers, and let me know what You have promised in answering the distressed. Indeed, You are the Possessor of great bounty and generous favor.

text.en:
Yasir, a servant of Caliph Ma'mun, narrated:
When Imam al-Ridha (peace be upon him) entered the palace of Hamid ibn Qahtaba, he removed his clothes and handed them to Hamid. Hamid then gave them to his maidservant for washing. Shortly thereafter, the maid returned with a piece of paper, saying she had found it in the collar of the Imam's shirt. She handed it to Hamid, who then presented it to the Imam, saying: 
"May I be your ransom! This maid has found a written note in the collar of your shirt. What is it?" 
The Imam replied: "It is an amulet (taʿwīdh) that I never part with." 
Hamid asked: "Could you honor us by sharing it?" 
The Imam said: "This is an amulet that, when kept in one's pocket, wards off calamities and serves as protection against the accursed Satan." 
He then recited the text of the amulet, which begins:

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ اللّٰهِ الرَّحْمٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ، بِسْمِ اللّٰهِ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِالرَّحْمٰنِ مِنْكَ إِنْ كُنْتَ تَقِيّاً، أَوْ غَيْرَ تَقِيٍّ، أَخَذْتُ بِاللّٰهِ السَّمِيعِ الْبَصِيرِ عَلَىٰ سَمْعِكَ وَبَصَرِكَ، لَاسُلْطانَ لَكَ عَلَيَّ وَلَا عَلَىٰ سَمْعِي، وَلَا عَلَىٰ بَصَرِي، وَلَا عَلَىٰ شَعْرِي، وَلَا عَلَىٰ بَشَرِي، وَلَا عَلَىٰ لَحْمِي، وَلَا عَلَىٰ دَمِي، وَلَا عَلَىٰ مُخِّي، وَلَا عَلَىٰ عَصَبِي، وَلَا عَلَىٰ عِظامِي، وَلَا عَلَىٰ مالِي، وَلَا عَلَىٰ مَا رَزَقَنِي رَبِّي

translation.en: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful. In the name of Allah, I seek refuge in the Most Gracious from you, whether you are pious or not. I take refuge in Allah, the All-Hearing, the All-Seeing, over your hearing and your sight. You have no power over me, nor over my hearing, nor over my sight, nor over my hair, nor over my skin, nor over my flesh, nor over my blood, nor over my brain. Nor on my nerves, nor on my bones, nor on my wealth, nor on what my Lord has provided me

segments.arabic: سَتَرْتُ بَيْنِي وَ بَيْنَكَ بِسِتْرِ النُّبُوَّةِ الَّذِي اسْتَتَرَ أَنْبِياءُ اللّٰهِ بِهِ مِنْ سَطَواتِ الْجَبابِرَةِ وَالْفَراعِنَةِ، جَبْرَئِيلُ عَنْ يَمِينِي، وَمِيكائِيلُ عَنْ يَسارِي، وَ إِسْرافِيلُ عَنْ وَرائِي، وَمُحَمَّدٌ صَلَّى اللّٰهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ أَمامِي، وَاللّٰهُ مُطَّلِعٌ عَلَيَّ، يَمْنَعُكَ مِنِّي وَيَمْنَعُ الشَّيْطانَ مِنِّي . اللّٰهُمَّ لَا يَغْلِبُ جَهْلُهُ أَناتَكَ أَنْ يَسْتَفِزَّنِي وَيَسْتَخِفَّنِي . اللّٰهُمَّ إِلَيْكَ الْتَجَأْتُ، اللّٰهُمَّ إِلَيْكَ الْتَجَأْتُ، اللّٰهُمَّ إِلَيْكَ الْتَجَأْتُ.

translation.en: I have veiled between you and me with the veil of prophethood with which the prophets of Allah veiled themselves from the tyrants and the Pharaohs. Gabriel is on my right, Michael is on my left, Israfil is behind me, and Muhammad (peace and blessings of Allah be upon him and his family) is in front of me. Allah is aware of me, and He protects you from me and protects Satan from me. O Allah, do not let his ignorance overcome Your compassion, so that he provokes me and makes me look down. O Allah, to You I have sought refuge, O Allah, to You I have sought refuge, O Allah, to You I have sought refuge.

segments.arabic: يَا نُورُ يَا بُرْهانُ، يَا مُبِينُ يَا مُنِيرُ، يَا رَبِّ اكْفِنِي الشُّرُورَ وَآفاتِ الدُّهُورِ، وَأَسْأَلُكَ النَّجاةَ يَوْمَ يُنْفَخُ فِي الصُّورِ.
segments.transliteration: ya nur ya burhanu, ya mubin ya muniru, ya rabb akfini alshshurur wafat aldduhuri, wa'as'aluk alnnajat yawm yunfakh fi alssuri.

translation.en: O Light, O Proof, O Manifester, O Illuminator, O Lord, protect me from evils and the calamities of the ages, and I ask You for salvation on the Day when the Trumpet is blown.

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ اللّٰهِ الرَّحْمٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ، يَا عَزِيزَ الْعِزِّ فِي عِزِّهِ، مَا أَعَزَّ عَزِيزَ الْعِزِّ فِي عِزِّهِ، يَا عَزِيزُ أَعِزَّنِي بِعِزِّكَ، وَأَيِّدْنِي بِنَصْرِكَ، وَادْفَعْ عَنِّي هَمَزاتِ الشَّياطِينِ، وَادْفَعْ عَنِّي بِدَفْعِكَ، وَامْنَعْ عَنِّي بِصُنْعِكَ، وَاجْعَلْنِي مِنْ خِيارِ خَلْقِكَ، يَا واحِدُ يَا أَحَدُ يَا فَرْدُ يَا صَمَدُ.بِسْمِ اللّٰهِ الرَّحْمٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ، يَا عَزِيزَ الْعِزِّ فِي عِزِّهِ، مَا أَعَزَّ عَزِيزَ الْعِزِّ فِي عِزِّهِ، يَا عَزِيزُ أَعِزَّنِي بِعِزِّكَ، وَأَيِّدْنِي بِنَصْرِكَ، وَادْفَعْ عَنِّي هَمَزاتِ الشَّياطِينِ، وَادْفَعْ عَنِّي بِدَفْعِكَ، وَامْنَعْ عَنِّي بِصُنْعِكَ، وَاجْعَلْنِي مِنْ خِيارِ خَلْقِكَ، يَا واحِدُ يَا أَحَدُ يَا فَرْدُ يَا صَمَدُ.
segments.transliteration: bism alllh alrrahmn alrrahimi, ya eaziz aleizz fi eizzihi, ma 'aeazz eaziz aleizz fi eizzihi, ya eaziz 'aeizzani bieizzika, wa'ayidni binasrika, wadfae eanni hamazat alshshayatini, wadfae eanni bidafeika, wamnae eanni bisuneika, wajealni min khiar khalqika, ya wahid ya 'ahad ya fard ya samadu.

translation.en: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful. O Mighty in glory, in glory! How mighty is the Mighty in glory! O Mighty, honor me with Your glory, support me with Your victory, ward off from me the insinuations of the devils, ward off from me with Your wardship, guard against me with Your work, and make me from the best of Your creation. O One, O Unique, O Unique, O Eternal Refuge.

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ اللّٰهِ الرَّحْمٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ، يَا عُدَّتِي عِنْدَ شِدَّتِي، وَيَا غَوْثِي عِنْدَ كُرْبَتِي، وَيَا مُؤْنِسِي عِنْدَ وَحْدَتِي، احْرُسْنِي بِعَيْنِكَ الَّتِي لَاتَنامُ، وَاكْنُفْنِي بِرُكْنِكَ الَّذِي لَايُرامُ.
segments.transliteration: bism alllh alrrahmn alrrahimi, ya euddati eind shiddati, waya ghawthi eind kurbati, waya munisi eind wahdati, ahrusni bieaynik allati latanamu, waknufni biruknik alladhi layuramu.

translation.en: In the name of God, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful. O my support in times of adversity, O my helper in times of distress, O my companion in times of solitude, protect me with Your eye that never sleeps, and shelter me with Your corner that cannot be reached.

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ اللّٰهِ الرَّحْمٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ، يَا مالِكَ الرِّقابِ، وَيَا هازِمَ الْأَحْزابِ، يَا مُفَتِّحَ الْأَبْوابِ، يَا مُسَبِّبَ الْأَسْبابِ، سَبِّبْ لَنا سَبَباً لَا نَسْتَطِيعُ لَهُ طَلَباً، بِحَقِّ لَاإِلٰهَ إِلّا اللّٰهُ مُحَمَّدٌ رَسُولُ اللّٰهِ، صَلَّى اللّٰهُ عَلَيْهِ وَعَلَىٰ آلِهِ أَجْمَعِينَ.
segments.transliteration: bism alllh alrrahmn alrrahimi, ya malik alrriqabi, waya hazim al'ahzabi, ya mufattih al'abwabi, ya musabbib al'asbabi, sabbib lana sababaan la nastatie lah talabaan, bihaqq la'iilh 'illa alllh muhammad rasul alllhi, salla alllh ealayh waealaa alih 'ajmaeina.

translation.en: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful. O Possessor of necks, O Defeater of parties, O Opener of doors, O Causer of causes, cause us a cause that we cannot seek, by the right of there is no god but Allah, Muhammad is the Messenger of Allah, may Allah's prayers and peace be upon him and all his family.

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ اللّٰهِ الرَّحْمٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ، لَاإِلٰهَ إِلّا اللّٰهُ، عَلَيْهِ تَوَكَّلتُ، وَهُوَ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ، مَا شاءَ اللّٰهُ كانَ، وَمَا لَمْ يَشَأْ لَمْ يَكُنْ، أَشْهَدُ أَنَّ اللّٰهَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ، وَأَنَّ اللّٰهَ قَدْ أَحاطَ بِكُلِّ شَيْءٍ عِلْماً . اللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ نَفْسِي، وَمِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ دابَّةٍ أَنْتَ آخِذٌ بِناصِيَتِها، إِنَّ رَبِّي عَلَىٰ صِراطٍ مُسْتَقِيمٍ.
segments.transliteration: bism alllh alrrahmn alrrahimi, la'iilh 'illa alllhu, ealayh tawakkaltu, wahu rabb alearsh aleazimi, ma sha' alllh kana, wama lam yasha lam yakun, 'ashhad 'ann alllh ealaa kull shay' qadirun, wa'ann alllh qad 'ahat bikull shay' eilmaan . alllhumm 'inni 'aeudh bik min sharr nafsi, wamin sharr kull dabbat 'ant akhidh binasiatiha, 'inn rabbi ealaa sirat mustaqimin.

translation.en: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful. There is no god but Allah. Upon Him I have relied, and He is the Lord of the Mighty Throne. Whatever Allah wills will happen, and whatever He does not will will not happen. I bear witness that Allah has power over all things, and that Allah encompasses all things in knowledge. O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the evil of my soul and from the evil of every creature over which You have control. Indeed, my Lord is on a straight path.

text.en: A tried and tested supplication for protection. It was narrated on the authority of Anas that he said: The Messenger of God, may God bless him and his family, said: Whoever recites this supplication every morning and evening, God Almighty will assign four angels to protect him from in front of him, from behind him, from his right and from his left, and he will be in the protection of God Almighty, and if the creatures of jinn and humans try to harm him, they will not be able to. It is this supplication:

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ اللّٰهِ الرَّحْمٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ، بِسْمِ اللّٰهِ خَيْرِ الْأَسْماءِ، بِسْمِ اللّٰهِ رَبِّ الْأَرْضِ وَالسَّماءِ، بِسمِ اللّٰهِ الَّذِي لَايَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهِ سَمٌّ وَلَا داءٌ، بِسْمِ اللّٰهِ أَصْبَحْتُ، وَعَلَى اللّٰهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ، بِسْمِ اللّٰهِ عَلَىٰ قَلْبِي وَنَفْسِي، بِسْمِ اللّٰهِ عَلَىٰ دِينِي وَعَقْلِي، بِسْمِ اللّٰهِ عَلَىٰ أَهْلِي وَمالِي، بِسْمِ اللّٰهِ عَلَىٰ مَا أَعْطانِي رَبِّي، بِسْمِ اللّٰهِ الَّذِي لَا يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهِ شَيْءٌ فِي الْأَرْضِ، وَلَا فِي السَّماءِ، وَهُوَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ
segments.transliteration: duea' lilhifz mjrrb ruy ean 'anas qal : qal rasul allah salaa‌allah‌ealayhi‌walah man daea bihadha alduea' fi kuli sabah wamasa' wkkl allah taealaa bih 'arbaean min almalayikat yahfazunah min bayn yadayh wamin khalfih waean yaminih washamalih wakan fi 'aman allah ezz wjll , wa'iin ha'awlat alkhalayiq min aljini wal'iins 'an tadurah matmkknt wahu hadha alduea' :

translation.en: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful. In the name of Allah, the best of names. In the name of Allah, Lord of the earth and the heavens. In the name of Allah, with whose name neither poison nor disease can harm. In the name of Allah I begin, and in Allah I rely. In the name of Allah upon my heart and my soul. In the name of Allah upon my religion and my mind. In the name of Allah upon my family and my wealth. In the name of God, for what my Lord has given me, in the name of God with whose name nothing on earth or in heaven can harm, and He is the All-Hearing, the All-Knowing.

segments.arabic: اللّٰهُ اللّٰهُ رَبِّي لَاأُشْرِكُ بِهِ شَيْئاً، اللّٰهُ أَكْبَرُ اللّٰهُ أَكْبَرُ، وَ أَعَزُّ وَأَجَلُّ مِمَّا أَخافُ وَأَحْذَرُ، عَزَّ جارُكَ وَجَلَّ ثَناؤُكَ، وَلَا إِلٰهَ غَيْرُكَ . اللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ نَفْسِي، وَمِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ سُلْطانٍ شَدِيدٍ، وَمِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ شَيْطانٍ مَرِيدٍ، وَمِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ جَبَّارٍ عَنِيدٍ
segments.transliteration: alllh alllh rabbi la'ushrik bih shayyaan, alllh 'akbar alllh 'akbaru, w 'aeazz wa'ajall mimma 'akhaf wa'ahdharu, eazz jaruk wajall thanawuka, wala 'iilh ghayruk . alllhumm 'inni 'aeudh bik min sharr nafsi, wamin sharr kull sultan shadidin, wamin sharr kull shaytan maridin, wamin sharr kull jabbar eanid

translation.en: Allah, Allah is my Lord, I associate nothing with Him. Allah is Greatest, Allah is Greatest. He is more powerful and more majestic than what I fear and beware. Your glory is mighty and Your praise is great. There is no god but You. O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the evil of my soul, from the evil of every powerful ruler, from the evil of every rebellious devil, and from the evil of every stubborn tyrant.

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ شَرِّ قَضاءِ السُّوءِ، وَمِنْ كُلِّ دابَّةٍ أَنْتَ آخِذٌ بِناصِيَتِها، إِنَّكَ عَلَىٰ صِراطٍ مُسْتَقِيمٍ، وَأَنْتَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ حَفِيظٌ، ﴿ إِنَّ وَلِيِّيَ اللّٰهُ الَّذِي نَزَّلَ الْكِتٰابَ وَ هُوَ يَتَوَلَّى الصّٰالِحِينَ﴾، ﴿فَإِنْ تَوَلَّوْا فَقُلْ حَسْبِيَ اللّٰهُ، لاٰ إِلٰهَ إِلاّٰ هُوَ عَلَيْهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ، وَ هُوَ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ﴾
segments.transliteration: wamin sharr qada' alssu'i, wamin kull dabbat 'ant akhidh binasiatiha, 'innak ealaa sirat mustaqimin, wa'ant ealaa kull shay' hafizun, ﴿ 'inn waliiy alllh alladhi nazzal alkitab w hu yatawalla alssalihina﴾, ﴿fa'iin tawallawa faqul hasbi alllhu, la 'iilh 'iila hu ealayh tawakkaltu, w hu rabb alearsh aleazimi

translation.en: And from the evil of evil judgment, and from every creature - You hold its forelock. Indeed, You are on a straight path, and You are, over all things, Guardian. Indeed, my ally is Allah, who has sent down the Book, and He is the ally of the righteous. But if they turn away, then say, "Sufficient for me is Allah. There is no deity except Him. Upon Him I have relied, and He is the Lord of the Mighty Throne."

name: To protect oneself from the evil eye

text.en: To protect against the evil eye, the following verse was inserted:

segments.arabic: وَإِن يَكَادُ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا لَيُزْلِقُونَكَ بِأَبْصَارِهِمْ لَمَّا سَمِعُوا الذِّكْرَ وَيَقُولُونَ إِنَّهُ لَمَجْنُونٌ

translation.en: Indeed the faithless almost devour you with their eyes when they hear this Reminder, and they say, ‘He is indeed crazy.’

text.en: It is also narrated from Imam Sadiq (a.s.): When one fears that his eyes will affect someone, or someone's eyes will affect him, he should say three times:

segments.arabic: ما شاءَ الله وَلا قوَّةَ إِلاّ بِالله العَلي العَظيمِ
segments.transliteration: ma sha' allah wala qwwat 'iila biallh alealy aleazym

translation.en: What God wills, and there is no power except with God, the Most High, the Almighty

text.en: It has been reported that whenever someone adorns himself in a beautiful manner, he should recite Surahs An-Nas and Al-Falaq when he leaves the house, so that nothing, by the permission of Allah Almighty, will harm him.
And also to ward off the evil eye: one should raise one's hands in front of one's face and recite Surahs "Hamd", "Tawhid", "Nas", and "Falaq" and rub one's hands on one's forehead.
And also a prayer for protection from the evil eye:

segments.arabic: اللّٰهُمَّ رَبَّ مَطَرٍ حابِسٍ، وَحَجَرٍ يابِسٍ، وَلَيْلٍ دامِسٍ، وَرَطْبٍ وَيابِسٍ، رُدَّ عَيْنَ الْعايِنِ عَلَيْهِ فِي كَبِدِهِ وَنَحْرِهِ وَماله، ﴿فَارْجِعِ الْبَصَرَ هَلْ تَرىٰ مِنْ فُطُورٍ، ثُمَّ ارْجِعِ الْبَصَرَ كَرَّتَيْنِ يَنْقَلِبْ إِلَيْكَ الْبَصَرُ خٰاسِئاً وَ هُوَ حَسِيرٌ﴾

translation.en: Oh God, the Lord of the rain, and the stone is dry, and the night is damp, and the water is dry, and the eyes of the eyes are turned away from him, (Return of sight, do you see it from breakfast, then return of sight, the two balls turn towards you especially, and it is a carpet)

text.en: Another Dua

segments.arabic: اللّٰهُمَّ ذَا السُّلْطانِ الْعَظِيمِ، وَالْمَنِّ الْقَدِيمِ، وَالْوَجْهِ الْكَرِيمِ، ذَا الْكَلِماتِ التَّامَّاتِ وَالدَّعَواتِ الْمُسْتَجَابَاتِ، عافِ فُلانَ مِنْ أَنْفُسِ الْجِنِّ وَأَعْيُنِ الْإِنْسِ.
segments.transliteration: alllhumm dha alssultan aleazimi, walmann alqadimi, walwajh alkarimi, dha alkalimat alttammat walddaeawat almustajabati, eaf fulan min 'anfus aljinn wa'aeyun al'iinsi.

translation.en: O Allah, the Possessor of great power, ancient favor, and noble countenance, the Possessor of perfect words and answered supplications, save so-and-so from the souls of the jinn and the eyes of mankind.

name: To drive away demons and witches

text.en: It was narrated on the authority of the Prophet, may God bless him and his family, to recite the verse of mockery, which is:

segments.arabic: إِنَّ رَبَّكُمُ اللَّهُ الَّذِي خَلَقَ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ فِي سِتَّةِ أَيَّامٍ ثُمَّ اسْتَوَىٰ عَلَى الْعَرْشِ يُغْشِي اللَّيْلَ النَّهَارَ يَطْلُبُهُ حَثِيثًا وَالشَّمْسَ وَالْقَمَرَ وَالنُّجُومَ مُسَخَّرَاتٍ بِأَمْرِهِ ۗ أَلَا لَهُ الْخَلْقُ وَالْأَمْرُ ۗ تَبَارَكَ اللَّهُ رَبُّ الْعَالَمِينَ

translation.en: Indeed your Lord is Allah, who created the heavens and the earth in six days, and then settled on the Throne. He draws the night’s cover over the day, which pursues it swiftly, and [He created] the sun, the moon, and the stars, [all of them] disposed by His command. Look! All creation and command belong to Him. Blessed is Allah, the Lord of all the worlds.

segments.arabic: ادْعُوا رَبَّكُمْ تَضَرُّعًا وَخُفْيَةً ۚ إِنَّهُ لَا يُحِبُّ الْمُعْتَدِينَ

translation.en: Supplicate your Lord, beseechingly and secretly. Indeed, He does not like the transgressors.

segments.arabic: وَلَا تُفْسِدُوا فِي الْأَرْضِ بَعْدَ إِصْلَاحِهَا وَادْعُوهُ خَوْفًا وَطَمَعًا ۚ إِنَّ رَحْمَتَ اللَّهِ قَرِيبٌ مِّنَ الْمُحْسِنِينَ

translation.en: And do not cause corruption on the earth after its restoration, and supplicate Him with fear and hope: indeed Allah’s mercy is close to the virtuous.
